：难 解 析 ： 本题考查纳税筹划的相关内容，主要包括个人所得税的计算，对比两种不同方案下购置 property 的情况，并求出节税金额，共9分。 题目中针对购置房屋给出两种方案： 方案一：以个人身份购置residential 性质的房屋并进行出租 方案二：以公司名义购置房屋并进行出租 针对方案一： (1) 正确填写题目告知的employment income(0.5分 ) (2) 使 用cash basis计 算 property income,扣除相关费用，得到PBI 。(各数据0.5分，小 计1分)。 (3) 扣除标准PA12,570(0.5 分 ) (4) 正常计算taxable income对应的tax liability(1分 ) (5) 由于购置residential 性质的房屋，所以贷款利息以20%的税率在income tax liability 之后扣除。(1分) 针对方案二： (1) 正确填写题目告知的employment income及 dividend income,(各0.5分，小计1分) (2) 扣除标准PA12,570(0.5 分 ) (3) 正常计算 taxable income 对应的tax liability,特别强调dividend income的其中1,000 免税(各0 . 5分，小计2分) 总结：对两种方案下总税负金额进行比较，根据计算带入方案一下的个税金额(0.5分),加 总带入方案二下已经告知企税税负金额加上计算得出的个人所得税金额(0.5分),求出差额 得到最终的节税金额。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试中偏难的关于纳税筹划的考题，知识点为常考基础知识点，但是考法灵活， 需要同学们将知识点融会贯通，建议同学做题的得分应该在5分以上。 (b)Explain ONE way in which the calculation of a future taxable gain on a property disposal made by the limited company would differ from the calculation of a taxable gain on a disposal made personally by Kat. (1 mark) 题目类型：w ord 答 案 ： The annual exempt amount of £6,000 will not be available if the gain occurs within a limited company. 难易程度： 易 解 析 ： 本题考查以个人身份购置residential 性质的房屋和以公司名义购置房屋，这两种处理方案下， 对于未来可能进行资产处置时资本利得计算有什么影响，共1分。 个人处置资产属于个人资本利得税的计算范畴，可以享受6,000的annual exemption amount; 公司处置资产所得利得属于企税总收入中的一部分，无annual exemption amount 。(1分 ) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该为1分。 2018-S/D-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1、雇佣收入的计算； 2、经营性收入，尤其是合伙人利润分配的的计算； 3、个人纳税征管时间的考察。 Martin is employed by Global plc and he is also a member of a partnership.The following information is available in respect of the tax year 2023/24: Employment (1)During the tax year 2023/24,Martin was paid a gross annual salary of £144,000 in respect of his employment with Global plc. (2)In addition to his salary,Martin was paid the following bonuses by Global plc: Amount In respect of the Date of payment Date of entitlement £ six-month period ended 18,200 28 February 2023 31March 2023 20March 2023 21,400 31 August 2023 31 August 2023 20 September 2023 13,700 28 February 2024 30 April 2024 20March 2024 (3)During the tax year 2022/23,Global plc provided Martin with the following cars: Period provided Cars List price CO₂emission rate £ 6 April to 31 December Hybrid-electric car(Electric 18,450 45 grams per 2023 range is 25 miles) kilometre 1 January to 5 April Petrol powered car 24,905 52 grams per 2024 kilometre Martin was not provided with any fuel for private use. (4)On6 April 2023,Global plc provided Martin with an interest free loan off8,000 which he used to purchase a motor bike.No loan repayments were made during the year. (5)Throughout the tax year 2023/24,Global plc allowed Martin private use ofa home entertainment system owned by the company.The home entertainment system cost Global plc f7,400 on 6April 2023. (6)During the tax year 2023/24,Martin donated a total of £1,000(gross)to charity under the payroll deduction scheme operated by Global plc. (7)Martin paid an annual professional subscription of 560 which is relevant to his employment with Global plc.Martin also paid an annual membership fee of £1,240 to a health club which he used to entertain Global plc's clients.Global plc did not reimburse Martin for either of these costs. Partnership (1)Martin has been in partnership with Norma and Oprah since 1 April 2008.The partnership's trading profit for the year ended 31 March 2024 was £54,600. (2)Until 31 December 2023,profits were shared 40%with Martin,30%with Norma and 30% with Oprah.Since 1 January 2023,profits have been shared equally. Other income (1)During the tax year 2023/24,Martin rented out one furnished room ofhis main residence, receiving rent of f9,200 for the year.No additional expenditure was incurred as a result of the letting. (2)During the tax year 2023/24,Martin received dividends of £440. (3)On 30 November 2023,Martin received interest of f1,330 on the maturity of savings certificates from NS&I(National Savings and Investments). Self-assessment tax return Martin always files his self-assessment tax return online on 26 December,so his tax return for the tax year 2023/24 will be filed on 26 December 2024. Because more than 80%of Martin's tax liability is paid under PAYE,he is not required to make self-assessment payments on account. (2018 S/DQ32) Required: (a)Calculate Martin's taxable income for the tax year 2023/24. Note:You should indicate by the use of zero(0)any items which are not taxable or deductible. (11 marks) (b)(i)Advise Martin of the deadline for making an amendment to his self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2023/24 and state how HM Revenue and Customs(HMRC)will calculate interest if such an amendment results in additional tax becoming payable. (2 marks) (ii)State the latest date by which HMRC will have to notify Martin if they intend to carry out a compliance check in respect of his self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2023/24,and (assuming the check is not made on a completely random basis)the possible reasons why such a check would be made. 2023.3.20,属于2022/23税务年度，则不包含在本题计算的2023/24的收入当中。 f21,400计税时间为2023.8.31,属于2023/24,£13,700计税时间是2024.3.20,属于 2023/24税务年度。(1分) (3) 公司给Martin 提供了两辆车可供私用，则需要计算应税福利。在2023/24税务年度 中，前一辆车使用时间内为9个月，后一辆车使用时间为3个月。根据车辆类别对 照税率表确认计税的百分比，然后乘每辆车的list price, 再考虑时间比例分配。 (每辆车计算各1分，共2分) (4) 公司给Martin 提供了免息贷款，贷款本金超过£10,000需要计算应税福利，贷款本 金金额低于£10,000,则为免税福利。(0.5分) (5) 公司给Martin 提供了家庭娱乐设备可供私用，需要计算 use benefit,计税金额为cost 的20%。(1分) (6) Martin 支出的 charity donation under the payroll deduction scheme 为税法允许从雇佣 收入中扣除的项目。(0.5分) (7) Martin 支出的 annual professional subscription跟工作相关且未报销，为税法允许从 雇佣收入中扣减的费用，他支出的health club which he used to entertain clients 为税 法不允许从雇佣收入中扣减的费用。(两个费用各0.5分，共1分) Martin是合伙人，有经营收入： 在计算合伙人税务利润的时候，在合伙制企业的会计期间(税务期间)将企业的利润按约定 的比例进行分配。 Martin 从2008年开始就是合伙人，税务期间和会计期间的保持一致，合伙企业的会计期间 2023.4.1-2024.3.31的经营收入为f54,600。前 9 个 月Martin 利润分得40%,后3个月分得三 分之一，分得的利润=54,600×9/12×40%+54,600×3/12×1/3,即为本税务年度计税的经营收 入。(前九个月和后三个月各1分，共2分) Martin的其他收入： (1) Martin 出租了自己主要住所的一间屋子(可以用rent a room relief的方法计算租赁 收入),收到租金为£9,200,超过f7,500, 则可以选择用收入减掉£7,500来计算应税 租赁收入。(1分) (2) Martin 收到的分红收入直接计入应税收入。(0.5分) (3) Martin 收到的来自savings certificates from NS&I的利息收入为免税收入。(0.5分) Martin 的 ANI 超过f125,140, 则 PA 为0。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在8分以 上。 (b)(i)Advise Martin of the deadline for making an amendment to his self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2023/24 and state how HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC)will calculate interest if such an amendment results in additional tax becoming payable. (2 marks) (ii)State the latest date by which HMRC will have to notify Martin if they intend to carry out a compliance check in respect of his self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2023/24,and (assuming the check is not made on a completely random basis)the possible reasons why such a check would be made. (2marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： (i)Martin's deadline for amending his self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2023/24 will be 31 January 2026(12 months from the latest(electronic)filing date for the return of 31 January 2025). Should additional tax become payable,then interest will be charged from 31 January 2025 to the day before the additional tax is paid. (ii)If HMRC intend to carry out a compliance check into Martin's self-assessment tax return for 2023/24,then they will have to notify him by 26 December 2025(12 months after they receive his tax return). HMRC will carry out a compliance check because of a suspicion that income has been undeclared or deductions have been incorrectly claimed. 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考察个人税收征管相关规定，文字论述为主，共4分。 (1) 正常情况下，tax return上交截止日最晚的时间为电子版上交截止日，针对2023/24 税务年度是2025.1.31,因此修改的截止日是2026.1.31。(1分) 如果修改后导致需要补交税款，则该笔税款要计算罚息，从2025.1.31到真正上 交日，计算利息。(1分) (2) 如果HMRC 对 Martin 要做 compliance check,HMRC 必须在26 December 2025 之前通知Martin 。(1 分 ) HMRC 对个人做compliance check 的理由是，怀疑他有未披露的收入或抵减项目 有误。(1分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在3分以 上 。 2018-S/D-Q33 本题核心知识点： 1、企税的计算 2、企业会计利润转化税务利润的处理 3、集团的亏损转让 You are a trainee chartered certified accountant assisting your manager with the tax affairs of three unconnected limited companies,Ash Ltd,Beech Ltd and Cedar Ltd. Ash Ltd Ash Ltd was incorporated in the UK on 1 December 2021 and immediately opened a non-interest-bearing bank account.The company commenced trading on 1 February 2022, preparing its first accounts for the 14-month period ended 31 March 2023.Accounts were then prepared for the year ended 31March 2024. At the date of incorporation,all three of Ash Ltd's directors(who each own one-third of the company's ordinary share capital)were based in the UK.However,on 1 October 2023,two of the directors moved overseas.The directors have always held Ash Ltd’s board meetings in the UK, and will continue to do so despite two of them moving overseas. Beech Ltd Beech Ltd’s summarised statement of profit or loss for the year ended 31 March 2024 is as follows: Gross profit Operating expenses Depreciation Gifts and donations Impairment loss Leasing costs Other expenses Finance costs Interest Profit beforepayable taxation Interest Profit before Note 1 2 3 4 5 f 566,175 (14,700) (4,975) (3,700) (12,600) (217,700) (7,000) 305.500 Note 1-Gifts and donations Gifts and donations of £4,975 comprise: Gifts to customers(pens costing f70 each and displaying Beech Ltd's name) Gifts to staff(decorative plaques costing f15 each to celebrate Beech Ltd's ten- year anniversary) Qualifying charitable donations £ 3,500 375 1.975 Note 2-Impairment loss On 31 March 2024,Beech Ltd wrote off an impairment loss of f3,700 relating to a trade debt. This was in respect of an invoice which had been due for payment on 15 October 2023. Note 3-Leasing costs The leasing costs of £12,600 are in respect of four car leases which commenced on 1 April 2023. Each of the four leased cars has CO₂emissions of 80 grams per kilometre. Note 4-Other expenses The other expenses of £217,700 include a fine of £6,400 for a breach of data protection law,and legal fees of £5,700 in connection with the renewal of a 15-year property lease.The remaining expenses are all fully allowable. Note 5-Interest payable The interest payable of f7,000 is in respect of the company's 4%loan notes which were issued on 1 September 2023.Interest of £6,000 was paid on 28 February 2023,with an accrual of 1,000 provided for at 31 March 2024.The loan notes were issued in order to finance the company's trading activities. Capital allowances No capital allowances are available for the year ended 31March 2024. Cedar Ltd Cedar Ltd is a 100%subsidiary company of Timber Ltd.The following information is available in respect of the two companies for the year ended 31 March 2024: (1)For the year ended 31March 2024,Cedar Ltd made a trading loss of f19,700. (2)On 28 December 2023,Cedar Ltd sold its entire shareholding of 25,000 £1 ordinary shares in Forest plc for f6.00 per share.Cedar Ltd had originally purchased 20,000 shares in Forest plc on 1 July 2012 for £24,800.On 20 July 2012,Forest plc made a 1 for 4 rights issue.Cedar Ltd took up its allocation under the rights issue in full,paying f1.15 for each new share issued.The indexation factor from July 2012 to December 2017 is 0.244 and from July 2012 to December 2023 is 0.342. (3)For the year ended 31 March 2024,Timber Ltd made: £ Trading loss 20,800 Capital loss 8,800 There is no possibility of Cedar Ltd or Timber Ltd offsetting their trading losses against prior year profits.The group has a policy ofutilising losses at the earliest opportunity. Note:Your computation should commence with the profit before taxation figure of £305,500, and should also list all of the items referred to in notes(1)to(5),indicating by the use of zero (0)any items which do not require adjustment. (6marks) (c) On the basis that all available claims and elections are made,calculate Cedar Ltd's taxable total profits for the year ended 31 March 2024. (5marks) (15marks) (a) (i)Identify Ash Ltd’s accounting periods throughout the period 1 December 2021 to 31 March 2024.(2 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： Accounting periods 1 February 2022 to 31 January 2023 1 February 2023 to 31March 2023 Year ended 31March 2024 难易程度：中 解 析 ： Y-PLATINUM 本题考察企业计税期间的判定，共2分。 Ash Ltd 的银行账户虽然在2021.12.1就开户了，但是在2022.2.1才开始正式营业，所以计税 期间应该从2022.2.1开始。会计期间从2022.2.1-2022.3.31,当公司的会计期间如果超过了12 个月，公司的计税期间就要分成两段：前12个月和剩余的月份。第一个计税期间是 2022.2.1-2023.1.31。(1分)第二个计税期间是2023.2.1-2023.3.31。(0.5分)第三个计税期 间是2023.4.1-2024.3.31。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该为2分。 (ii)Explain Ash Ltd's residence status throughout the period 1 December 2021 to 31 March 2024.(2 marks) 题目类型： word 答案： Ash Ltd was incorporated in the UK,so the company is therefore resident in the UK throughout the period 1 December 2021 to 31 March 2024.The move overseas of a majority of Ash Ltd's director/shareholders on 1 October 2023 does not have any impact on the company's residence status. 难易程度 ：易
explanation_zh: 本题考察企业 Residence status 的判定，共2分。 Ash Ltd 是在英国成立的公司，所以是英国的 resident company.(1 分 ) 股东移居海外对公司的residence status是没有影响的。(1分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在1分以 上 。 (b)Calculate Beech Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 31 March 2024. Note:Your computation should commence with the profit before taxation figure of f305,500, and should also list all of the items referred to in notes(1)to(5),indicating by the use ofzero (0) any items which do not require adjustment. (6 marks) 题目类型： excel 答案： Corporation tax computation for the year ended 31 March 2024 f Profit before taxation 305,500 Depreciation 14,700 Gifts to customers 3,500 Gifts to staff 0 Qualifying charitable donations 1,100 Impairment loss 0 Lease of cars(12,600×15%) 1,890 Data protection fine 6,400 Legal fees -Renewal of short lease 0( Interest payable 0 Trading profit/Total profits 333,090 Less Qualifying charitable donations (1,100) Taxable total profits 331,990 Corporation tax 331,990×25%=£82,998 难易程度：中 解析： 本题考察如何把会计利润调整成为税务利润，以及公司的企业所得税计算，共6分。 (1)Depreciation 是会计折旧，税法认可的是税务折旧 capital allowance, 所 以Depreciation £14,700应该加回。(0.5分) (2)Gift to customer 给客户的礼物成本是£70,超过了税法认可的E50, 所以应该加回。(0.5 分 ) (3)Gift to staff 给员工的是税法认为可以减去的，会计已经减去了，所以不需调整。(0.5 分 ) (4)根据企税税法的要求，qualifying charitable donations不是在计算 Trading profit 之时减去 的，所以应该先加回。(0.5分) (5)Impairment loss 坏账的核销题中已知是和经营相关的，所以不需调整。(0.5分) (6)租的车是二氧化碳排放量超过50g/km, 根据税法，只有85%的租车费可以抵减，但是 会计全部减去了，所以本题要加回15%。(1分) (7)违反数据保护法的违约罚金，税法不允许扣除，会计减去了，所以需要加回。(0.5分) (8)短期租赁的续租产生的法律费用是税法认为可减的，会计已经减去了，所以不需调整。 (0.5分) (9)Interest payable应付利息是为了公司的经营活动产生的，根据loan relationship rule, 应 当在 Trading profit中做调整。(0.5分) (10)Qualifying charitable donations 应该从 total profit中减去。(0.5分) (11)Augmented profit 为£331,990>upper limitE250,000,所以企业所得税税率是25%。(0.5 分 ) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在4分以 上 。 (c)On the basis that all available claims and elections are made,calculate Cedar Ltd’s taxable total profits for theyear ended 31 March 2024. (5 marks) 题目类型：excel 答 案 ： Corporation tax computation for the year ended 31 March 2024 f Disposal proceeds(25,000×f6.00) 150,000 Indexed cost (W1) (38,004) Chargeable gain 111,996 Capital loss from Timber Ltd (8,800) Trading loss relief (19,700) Group loss relief from Timber Ltd (20,800) Taxable total profits 62,696 Indexed cost(W1) Number Indexed cost f Purchase July 2012 20,000 24,800 Rights issue July 2012 5,000 5,750 25,000 30,550 Indexation to December 2017 30,550×0.244 7,454 38,004 Disposal December 2023 (25,000) (38,004) 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 本题考察企业产生资本利得，存在集团公司亏损的时候，应税总利润的算法，共5分。 (1)售价是每股价格乘以股数。(0.5分) (2)企税股票成本的匹配顺序依次是：1st 卖出当天；2nd 卖出日前9天；3rd股票池子。(1 分 ) (3)配股时股票的成本和数量都会发生变化，此处是易错点。(1分) (4)企税资本利得的计算要考虑Indexation allowance,2017年12月之后的则不需要了。(1 分 ) (5)Cedar Ltd 的经营亏损是f19,700, 已知条件。(0.5分) (6)Cedar Ltd 是Timber Ltd的100%子公司，所以两者可以组成75%集团公司，享受group relief。 Timber Ltd的经营亏损 f20,800 可以给Cedar Ltd使用。(0.5分) (7)Cedar Ltd 是 Timber Ltd的100%子公司，所以两者可以组成capital group,Timber Ltd 的Capital loss f8,800 可以给Cedar Ltd 使用。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在3分以 上 。 2019-M/J-Q31 本题核心知识点： 1 、投入PPS 对于节税的影响； 2、Residential property gain 对应资本利得税的计算； 3、遗产税的纳税筹划思想。 You should assume that today's date is 15 February 2024. You are a trainee chartered certified accountant dealing with the tax affairs of Dembe and her husband Kato. Personalpension contribution Dembe is self-employed and her trading profit for the year ended 31December 2023 is £130,000. She will not have any other incomes or outgoings for the tax year 2023/24. Dembe is planning to make a personal pension contribution of £32,000(net)before 5 April 2024 and would like to know the amount ofincome tax and national insurance contributions(NICs)that she will save as a result of making the pension contribution. Sale of residential property In March 2024,Dembe is going to sell a residential property and this will result in a chargeable gain of f67,000 if she makes the disposal. Dembe wants to know whether it would be beneficial to transfer the property to Kato,her husband, as ano gain/no loss transfer before it is sold in March 2024.The transfer from Dembe to Kato will cost £2,000 in additional legal fees,and this cost will reduce the chargeable gain to £65,000 if the disposal is made by Kato. Dembe has already made other disposals during the tax year 2023/24 which have utilised her annual exempt amount.Kato,however,has not yet made any disposals. Kato's taxable income for the tax year 2023/24 is f21,150. Inheritance tax Dembe,who knows nothing about inheritance tax(IHT),is concerned about the amount ofIHT which will be payable when she and Kato die.The couple's combined chargeable estate is valued at £1,000,000 for IHT purposes.The estate includes a main residence valued at f360,000. Under the terms of their wills,Dembe and Kato have initially left their entire estates to each other. Then when the second of them dies,the total estate of f1,000,000 will be left to the couple's children. The couple is not sure whether to change the terms of their wills so that assets worth £325,000 are left to their children when the first of them dies. Neither Dembe nor Kato have made any lifetime gifts. Required: (a)Calculate the reduction in Dembe's income tax liability and NICs for the tax year 2023/24 if she makes the personal pension contribution of £32,000(net)before 5April 2024. Note.You are not expected to prepare full tax computations. (4 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： f Extension of basic rate tax band 40,000(32,000×100/80)at 20%(40%-20%) 8,000 Reinstatement of personal allowance £4,860(£130,000-f125,140)at 45% £7,710(12,570-£4,860)at 40% 2,187 3,084 Reduction in income tax liability 13,271 National insurance contributions(NICs) 0 Total tax reduction 13,271 难易程度：难 解 析 ： 本题考察的知识点较多，涵盖个人所得税，资本利得税，及遗产税。知识点相对而言具有一 定的难度，需要全面把握和理解后方能做出正确答案。 (a) 问要求计算投入了PPS 之后，对整体税收和 NIC 的影响，属于个税范畴，共4分。 首先，Gross PPS会抬高 basic rate band,导致£40,000(32000×100/80)所对应的税率，由 原来higher rate 40% 降到现在的basic rate 20%, 所以40000×(40%-20%)就是税基线抬高所 带来的 tax saving(1.5分 ) ; 不考虑投入PPS 时 ，Dembe's adjusted net income是 f130,000, 超过 f125,140,PA=0; 投 入PPS 之后，Dembe's adjusted net income 是 f130,000-f40,000=f90,000, 小于 f100,000, 所以 PA=f12,570。PA 增加了£12,570,会让 taxable income 下降£12,570,注意higher rate limit为£125,140,£125,140以上45%,所以下降的E12,570当中，f4,860(£130,000-f125,140) 部分减少的税为45%税率的(1分),剩余£7,710( £12,570-£4,860)部分减少的税为40% 税率的(1分),加总就是PA 增加所带来的tax saving。 PPS 不能直接抵减EI 或 者TI, 所以对于NIC 的计算没有任何影响。(0.5分) 本题难度较大，考察同学们对于知识点的综合运用，建议得分在2分以上。 (b)Calculate the couple's overall savings for the tax year 2023/24,after taking into account the additional legal fees of £2,000,if the residential property is transferred to Kato and sold by him,rather than the property being sold by Dembe. (3marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： f f Disposal made by Dembe 67,000 at 28% 18,760 Disposal made by Kato 16,550(37,700-21,150)at 18% 2,979 42,450(65,000-6,000-16,550)at 28% 11,886 (14,865) Capital gains tax(CGT)saving 3,895 Additional legal fees (2,000) Overall saving 1,895 难易程度：中 解析： (b)问要求计算该住宅类房产由Dembe先转让给Kato,再由Kato处置，相较于由Dembe 自己直接处置，能产生多少 tax saving金额，属于资本利得税范畴，共3分。 首先考虑由Dembe 直接处置，由于计算CGT 时 ，taxable income要先占位置，所以先估算 出Dembe 个税范畴中的taxable income:Dembe有f130,000的 trading profit,即£130,000的 taxable income(ANI>£125,140,所 以PA 为0)超过了basic rate limit,并且题目说明Dembe 已经 utilised her annual exempt amount,所以在计算residential property gain 时 ，f67,000 直 接乘 higher rate 28% 即可得到CGT 金额；(0.5分) 再考虑Dembe 先转让给丈夫Kato, 再 由Kato 处置该住宅房产。因为Kato 的 taxable income 是£21,150,还有部分 basic rate band(37,700-21,150=£16,550) 没用完，所以Kato 处置计算 CGT 时，£16,550(37,700-£21,150)可以乘低税率18%; ( 1 分 ) 超 过basic rate band的 部分，因为Kato 没有其他转让，所以扣除 annual exempt amount f6,000后，乘税率28%; ( 1 分 ) 最后，两种不同处置方式下CGT 相减后得到的金额£3,895是CGT saving。但是题目中提到， 如果是转让给Kato, 让 Kato 处置的话，转让这个步骤是需要额外产生£2,000的legal fee, 这些费用需要由Dembe 和Kato 承担，所以CGT saving还需要再减掉这个额外发生的成本， 最后才是overalltax saving 金额。(0.5分) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 本题难度适中，知识点为基础知识点，建议得分在2分以上。 (c)Calculate the amount ofIHT payable,if any,were Dembe and Kato to both die in the near future,and explain whether or not it might be beneficial to leave assets worth £325,000 to their children when the first ofthem dies. Note.You should assume that the IHT rates and thresholds remain unchanged.(3 marks) 题目类型：excel 答 案 ： On first death,there will be no inheritance tax(IHT)liability because of the spouse exemption. There will also be no IHT liability on second death because the couple's residence nil rate bands and nil rate bands willexceed the value of the combined chargeable estate: f Combined chargeable estate 1,000,000 Residence nil rate bands(175,000×2) (350,000) Nil rate bands (325,000×2) (650,000) Chargeable at 40% 0 Even if IHT were payable(for example,if the value of the estate increases faster than the available nil rate bands),then there is no advantage to leaving assets to children on the first death.This is because unused nil rate bands can be transferred to the surviving spouse. 难易程度：难 解 析 ： (c) 问要求计算如果Dembe 和 Kato 在不久的未来去世，需要支付的遗产税，以及解释假设 在他们中第一个人去世后将价值 f325,000 的资产先转让给孩子是否有好处，共3分。 按照两个人之间的协议，第一个人去世后资产全部转让给在世的人，这次转让是夫妻间转让， 属于 spouse exemption, 免税(0.5分)。后者也去世后，资产由孩子继承，后去世者可以 使用自己的以及先去世配偶的 residence nil rate band(0.5分 ) 和 nil rate band(0.5分 ) , 合 计金额 f1,000,000, 故也不需要支付遗产税， chargeable amount 为0。(0 . 5分) 第一个人去世后就将价值 f325,000 的资产转让给孩子是不会更加划算的，因为 unused nil rate band 可以留给后去世的配偶使用。(1分) 本题难度较大，但是知识点为遗产税的基础知识点，建议得分在2分以上。 2019-M/J-Q32 本题核心知识点：

stem_zh: 3. 储蓄收入的计算 Up to and including the tax year 2021/22,Tonie was resident in the UK for tax purposes,spending more than 300 days in the UK each year.Tonie understands that for the tax year 2023/24,she will again automatically be treated as a resident in the UK,but is unsure of her residence status for the tax year 2022/23.For this tax year,Tonie was neither automatically resident in the UK nor automatically not resident.Throughout the tax year 2022/23,Tonie was travelling around the world and did not stay in any one country for longer than 30 days,although she did spend a total of 50 days in the UK.Tonie has a house in the UK,but it was let out throughout the tax year 2022/23.She is single,has no children,and stayed with a friend for the 50 days which she spent in the UK.Tonie did not do any substantive work in the UK during the 2022/23. The following information is available for the tax year 2023/24: Employment On 6 April 2023,Tonie,who is a software developer,accepted a one-year contract to maintain websites for Droid plc.Droid plc treated the contract as one of employment,with the payments to Tonie being subject to PAYE.However,Tonie thought that,because she was working from home, her employment status should instead have been one of self-employment. (1)For the term of the contract,from 6 April 2023 to 5 April 2024,Tonie was paid a fixed gross amount of f6,200 a month.During the term of the contract,Tonie was not permitted to work for any other clients.She was required to do the work personally,not being permitted to sub-contract the work to anyone else. (2)During the term of the contract,Tonie worked from home,but had to attend weekly meetings at Droid plc's offices to receive instructions regarding the work to be performed during the following week.During the period 6 April 2023 to 5 April 2024,Tonie used her private car for business visits to Droid plc's clients.She drove 2,300 miles,for which Droid plc paid an allowance of 60 pence per mile. (3)During the term of the contract,Tonie leased computer equipment at a cost of £180 a month. This was used 100%for business purposes. Property income (1)Tonie owns a freehold house which is let out(this is not a furnished holiday letting).The total amount of rent received during the tax year 2023/24 was f10,080. (2)Tonie partly financed the purchase of the property with a repayment mortgage,paying mortgage interest of £8,400 during the tax year 2023/24. (3)In May 2023,Tonie purchased a new washer-dryer for the property at a cost of £640.This was a replacement for an old washing machine which was scrapped,with nil proceeds.The cost of a similar washing machine would have been £380. (4)In November 2023,Tonie purchased a new dishwasher for the property at a cost of f560.The property did not previously have a dishwasher. (5)The other expenditure on the property for the tax year 2023/24 amounted to f1,110,and this is all allowable. (6)During the tax year 2023/24,Tonie rented out one furnished room of her main residence. During the year,she received rent of f8,580 and incurred allowable expenditure of £870 in respect of the room.Tonie always uses the most favourable basis as regards the tax treatment of the furnished room. Other income (1)On 1 July 2023,Tonie inherited f100,000(nominal value)of gilts paying interest at the rate of 3%.The inheritance was valued at f120,000.Interest is paid half-yearly on 30 June and 31 December based on the nominal value.Tonie sold the gilts on 30 November 2023 for f121,250 (including accrued interest). (2)On 31 January 2024,Tonie received a premium bond prize of £100. (3)On 31 March 2024,Tonie received interest of £520 on the maturity of savings certificates from NS&I(National Savings and Investments). Required: (d)Explain why Tonie was treated as not resident in the UK for the tax year2022/23. (2 marks) (e)List FOUR factors which are indicators of Tonie being treated as employed in relation to her contract with Droid plc rather than as self-employed. Note.You should confine your answer to the information given in the question . (2marks) (1 On the basis that Tonie is treated as employed in relation to her contract with Droid plc, calculate her taxable income for the tax year 2023/24. Note.You should indicate by the use of zero (0)any items which are not taxable or deductible. Required: (a)Explain why Tonie was treated as not resident in the UK for the tax year2022/23. (2 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案： Tonie was previously resident and was in the UK between 46 and 90 days.She therefore needed three UK ties or more to be treated as UK resident Tonie only had two UK ties,which were being in the UK for more than 90 days during the previous tax year,and spending more time in the UK than in any other country during 2022/23. 难易程度： 易 解 析： 本题考查Tonie 在2022/23为何不是UK resident,共 2 分 。 2022/23不能通过自动海外测试和自动英国纳税居民测试，因此需要用ties test,根据在英国 的天数和UK ties共同判断。2022/23在UK 待了50天，以前年度是UK resident, 因此如果满 足3个UK ties(or more)就是英国纳税居民。(0.5分) 本 题 中 他 满 足 的UK ties 只 有 两 个 ， 为Being in the UK for more than 90 days during the previous tax year 和 Spending more time in the UK than in any other country, 因 此 不 是UK resident 。 (1.5 分 ) 易错点： Tonie 虽然在UK 有家，但是全年出租，没有住过，所以不满足为一项UK tie。 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该为2分。 (b) List FOUR factors which are indicators of Tonie being treated as employed in relation to her contract with Droid plc rather than as self-employed. Note.You should confine your answer to the information given in the question. (2marks) 题目类型：word 答 案： The contract was for a relatively long period of time. Tonie did not take any financial risk.Tonie only worked for Droid plc. Tonie was required to do the work personally. Droid plc exercised control over Tonie via the weekly meetings and instructions 难易程度： 易 解 析： 本题考查雇佣的标识。 他的合同期比较长。(0.5分) 他个人不需要承担任何财务风险。(0.5分) 他必须自己亲自工作，不能请他人代替。(0.5分) 公司通过每周的会议和检查对 Tonie 实施严密控制。(0.5分) 本题的知识点是基础知识点，且可结合实际生活经验，建议同学做题的得分应该为2分。 (c) On the basis that Tonie is treated as employed in relation to her contract with Droid plc, calculate her taxable income for the tax year2023/24. Note.You should indicate by the use of zero(0)any items which are not taxable or deductible. 受Mileage allowance, 公 司支付的60p/mile 高于国家法定一万英里以内的45p/mile,因此超过部分15p/mile为Taxable benefit,加 入EI。(1分 ) (3)Tonie 租来的电脑完全用于公用，对应的租金可以抵减雇佣收入。(1分) Tonie 出租了一套House, 有租赁收入 (PBI), 个人租赁收入按Cash basis计算： (1)Tonie 收到的租金题目己知£10,080,按照cash basis直接计入。(0.5分) (2)由于租赁房为residential 性质，因此租赁收入中利息费用应在 income tax liability 下做 扣减，在计算应纳税收入时无需抵减。(1分) (3)家具成本的处理为减去相似功能新家具的MV- 旧家具的残值。对于Washing machine, 不能采用功能升级的Washer-dryer,要用Similar washing machine的价值，且旧家具 Nil proceeds无残值。(1 分 ) 对于Dishwasher, 是家具的Initial cost, 属于资本化支出，不可抵减租赁收入。(1分) (4)出租Room 考虑是否申请Rent a room relief。Rent大于f7,500, 可以选择将Expense 视为 £7,500,这比实际发生的费用£870高，所以选择申请该Relief, 直接将费用视同为f7,500 。(1 分 ) (5)题中已知的其他可减的都可以抵扣租赁收入。(0.5分) Tonie 的其他收入： (1)国债的利息收入，面值乘以票面利率乘以n/12, 税务年度内持有国债但未收到利息的 月份为2023.7.1-2023.11.30共5个月。(2分) ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINU (2)有奖债券获奖的收入属于免税收入。(0.5分) (3)国家投资及储蓄性银行所发行 savings certificate产生的利息免税。(0.5分) ( 4 ) 得 到 total income 之后需要考虑扣减PA即可得出Taxable income。此 人ANI 未超过 £100,000,无需调整PA 。(0.5 分 ) You are a trainee chartered certified accountant dealing with the tax affairs of three unrelated limited companies,Aoede Ltd,Bianca Ltd and Charon Ltd. Aoede Ltd Aoede Ltd commenced trading on 1 April 2022.The company's results are: Year ended Year ended 31 March 2023 31March 2024 £ £ Trading profit/(loss) Property business income/(loss) Chargeable gains Qualifying charitable donations (111,300) (26,400) 5,800 (6,000) 67,800 23,400 16,200 (6,600) Aoede Ltd owns 100%of the ordinary share capital of Moon Ltd.Moon Ltd commenced trading on 1 April 2023 and for the year ended 31 March 2024 made a trading profit of f19,700. Bianca Ltd Bianca Ltd commenced trading on 1 April 2023.The company's tax adjusted trading profit based on the statement of profit or loss for the year ended 31 March 2024 is f256,300.This figure is before making any adjustments required for: (1)Advertising expenditure of £5,800 incurred during January 2022 to promote Bianca Ltd's new business.This expenditure has not been deducted in calculating the profit of £256,300. (2)Leasing costs of f9,300 which have been deducted in arriving at the profit of £256,300.The leasing costs relate to two cars which have been leased since 1 April 2023.The first car has CO₂ emissions of 45 grams per kilometre and is leased at an annual cost of £4,200.The second car has CO₂emissions of 85 grams per kilometre and is leased at an annual cost of f5,100. On 2 April 2023,Kagan inherited some quoted ordinary shares valued at f510,000 following the death of his aunt.Kagan is unsure whether to retain the shares or sell some of them in order to make some alternative investments. Kagan is aged 61 and is an additional rate taxpayer.Prior to the inheritance,his taxable income, consisting entirely of employment income,for the tax year 2023/24 would have been f400,000. The income tax liability on this income for the tax year 2023/24 would have been £164,960. Prior to receiving the inheritance,Kagan's chargeable estate for inheritance tax(IHT)purposes was valued at 1,700,000.IHT of f550,000 would be payable were he to die in the near future. Retain the inherited shares If Kagan simply retains the inherited shares,then he will receive a dividend income of £15,300 during the tax year 2023/24.This is in addition to his employment income off400,000. Sell some inherited shares and make four alternative investments Kagan is considering selling some of his inherited shares(for which there has only been a minimal increase in value since he inherited them)to fund the following four investments,all of which will be made at the start of the tax year 2023/24: (1)Kagan will make a gross personal pension contribution of £100,000.Kagan is a member of a pension scheme,but has not made any contributions in recent years because his income has been substantially lower than it is for the tax year 2023/24.He therefore has sufficient unused annual allowances to cover a pension contribution of f100,000.Kagan will immediately withdraw £25,000 of the pension fund tax-free.This is the permitted 25%tax-free lump sum.However,no pension will be taken during the tax year 2023/24. (2)Kagan will invest f50,000 in premium bonds.The expected amount of premium bond prizes which will be received during the tax year 2023/24 is £700. (3)Kagan will invest the maximum permitted amount of £20,000 in a cash individual savings account(ISA).The ISA will pay interest of f400 during the tax year 2023/24. (4)Kagan will purchase a freehold property for f295,000(including all costs of purchase).The property will be let out unfurnished,with Kagan receiving property income of f9,600 during the tax year 2023/24. After making these four investments,Kagan will be left with f65,000 of inherited shares,on which he will receive dividend income of £1,950 during the tax year 2023/24.He will also have his employment income of f400,000. Kagan will not make any other disposals during the tax year 2023/24. Required (a)Calculate Kagan's revised income tax liability for the tax year 2023/24 if he retains the inherited shares. (1mark) (b)(i)Explain why little or no capital gains tax(CGT)will be payable if Kagan sells some of his inherited shares. (1mark) (ii)Calculate Kagan's revised income tax liability for the tax year 2023/24 if he sells some of his inherited shares andmakes the four alternative investments. Notes: 1.For this part of the question,you are expected to produce a full income tax computation. 2.You should indicate by the use of zero (0)any items which are not taxable (6 marks) (c)For each of the four alternative investments (pension contribution,premium bonds,ISA and freehold property)state whether the investment will reduce Kagan's potential IHT liability compared to him retaining the inherited shares. Note:For this part ofthe question,no computations are required. (10marks) (a)Calculate Kagan's revised income tax liability for the tax year 2023/24 if he retains the inherited shares. (1 mark) 题目类型：Word 答 案 ： Kagan's revised income tax liability for 2023/24 will be f170,587(£164,960+((15,300-£1,000) at 39.35%)). 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考查个人所得税的计算，共1分。 因为继承股票后额外获得了£15,300的股利，需要对该部分支付个人所得税。其中£1,000的 股 利 适 用 nil rate band 税 率 0 % 。 且 Kagan 是 additional rate taxpayer, 故 超 出 部 分 £14,300(£15,300-£1,000)适用税率39.35%。(1分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在1分。 (b)(i)Explain why little or no capital gains tax(CGT)will be payable if Kagan sells some of his inherited shares. (1mark) 题目类型：Word 答 案 ： The base cost of the shares will be their value at the time of the aunt's death (f510,000),so the minimal increase in value is likely to be covered by Kagan's annual exempt amount of f6,000. 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 第一小问要求解释处置股票为什么不需要缴纳资本利得税或者税额很少，共1分。 因为题目中提到后续出售该股票，价值只有少量增加(there has only been a minimal increase in value since he inherited them), 故可以理解为该部分价值增加低于annual exempt amount £6,000或者只超过一点点，所以不需要缴纳资本利得税或者税额很少。 (ii)Calculate Kagan's revised income tax liability for the tax year 2023/24 if he sells some of his inherited shares andmakes the four alternative investments. Notes: 1.For this part of the question,you are expected to produce a full income tax computation. 2.You should indicate by the use of zero (0)any items which are not taxable (6marks) 题目类型：Excel 答 案 ： Kagan-Income tax liability 2022/23 f Employment income 400,000 Pension lump sum 0 Premium bond prizes 0 Interest from ISA 0 Property income 9,600 Dividend income 1,950 Total income 411,550 Personal allowance 0 Taxable income 411,550 Income tax liability f f137,700 at 20% 27,540 87,440(E225,140-£137,700)at 40% 34,976 £184,460(f409,600-E225,140)at 45% 83,007 £1,000 at 0% 0 £950 at 39.35% 374 Income tax liability 145,897 Working1: f Basic rate limit=£37,700+E100,000 137,700 Higher rate limit=£125,140+£100,000 225,140 难易程度： 中 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 解 析 ： 第二小问，Kagan 如果卖掉部分遗产继承的股票去做投资，要求计算在2023/24的个人所得税 税款调整后的金额，共6分。 注意题目中明确指出如果该金额not taxable, 需要用数字0标注。 (1)工资收入，直接写，不用调整(0.5分) (2)Pension lump sum, 免税，写0(0.5分) (3)Premium bond prizes免税，写0(0.5分) (4)Interest from ISA,本金未超过f20,000免税，写0(0.5分) (5)租赁收入按照cash basis, 以收到部分计入收入(0.5分) (6)本期股利收入，直接写，不用调整(0.5分) (7)Kagan的ANI 超过f125,140,则没有PA,本 期PA=0(0.5 分) (8)计算income tax liability的时候注意，由于本期支付了PPS,basic rate limit 和 higher rate limit 要调增gross PPS的金额，即调增E100,000 。且题目中明确说了之前没有投过pension, 所 以有足够的annual allowance可以cover 这f100,000, 所以不需要考虑Annual allowance charge。 (合计2.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在5分以 上 。 (c)For each of the four alternative investments (pension contribution,premium bonds,ISA and freehold property)state whether the investment will reduce Kagan's potential IHT liability compared to him retaining the inherited shares. Note:For this part ofthe question,no computations are required. The investments in premium bonds,the ISA and the freehold property will not affect Kagan's potential IHT liability because one asset is simply being replaced with another of equivalent value. 难易程度：难 解 析 ： 本题要求分别解释说明相较于保留继承的股票，出售股票后四种投资行为是否能够减少 Kagan 未来潜在的遗产税税负。 投资在pension 中的部分，未来不会再属于chargeable estate, 不用计算遗产税。(0.5分) 剩余3种投资行为不影响遗产税的计算。(1.5分) 本题难度较大，建议建议同学做题的得分应该在0.5分以上。 2019-S/D-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1.Taxable income的计算框架，尤其是trading profit 以及property income 的计算 2.Compliance check 以及保持记录的时间 Robinette ceased self-employment on 31 March 2024.She was also employed by Bird plc for the six-month period from 1 August 2023 to 31 January 2024.Robinette commenced self-employment in a new business on 1 February 2024. explanation_zh: 本题考察企业所得税的计算，共15分。 本题中企业共有四大类型的收入，经营利润，租赁收入，利息收入以及资本利得。企业只有 企业所得税，并没有资本利得税这个税种。经营利润的调整要注意与企税和个税的区别，易 错点在于税务折旧的处理。租赁收入注意企业要用权责发生制。资本利得要注意Indexation allowance 的处理。 (1)作为承租方支付的premium 费用是可以递减经营利润的(0.5分)。要按照固定计算公 式 p-p×2%×(n-1)(1分)均摊到每一年进行扣除(0.5分)。承租方支付的premium 费用在 本计税期间只租了3个月，所以要进行时间分配，乘以3/12,得出本计税期间可减的部分是 £715(0.5分)。 (2)税务折旧的计算中，building cost of extension要利用固定的3%单独计算 SBA, 注意从 使用之日起计算，所以需要进行时间分配，乘以4/12(1分)。 对于出售的原来计提过130%的FYA 的资产，需要根据处置的金额计提 BC.(1.5 分) 原有的MP 余额需要计算 WDA18%(1 分)。最后三者加和注意符号问题，最后确定 capital allowance 为负数，即需要增加 tax adjusted trading profit。 (3)租赁收入的计算中，企业一定使用权责发生制，所以租金收入只有五个月的收入(1 分)。企业收到的房屋定金会退还给租客，所以不能作为收入，写0即可(0.5分)。 企业支付的保险费(1分)和广告费(0.5分)都是可抵减的费用，但是修理费用由题 目信息可知不修理房子就无法出租，所以修理费用是资本化支出，所以不可从租赁收入 中减去(1分)。 (4)企业资本利得的计算中，需要注意和个人资本利得计算的区别。 Indexation allowance只 针对发生在2017年12月之前的费用，所以第一个资产的enhancement expenditure没 有IA (0.5分),企业成本的IA 的 indexation factor 只能选取到2017年12月，所以用0.315(1.5 分)。 IA 也不能制造 capital loss,所以企业的第二个资产的资本利得为0(1.5分)。 题干中已有的数字抄写下来(1分)算出Taxable total profits。 企业所得税本年度的税率是25%,因为augmented profit(本题中为taxable total profit)已经超 过 upper limit 250,000,用应税总利润乘以税率即可得出企税。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见企业所得税的考察形式，大部分都为基础知识点，建议学生得分10 分以上。 2020-M/J-Q31 本题核心知识点： 1、个人所得税纳税筹划的考核 2 、NIC 的计算以及养老保险金的考核 3、企业所得税纳税筹划的考核 You should assume that today's date is 1April 2024. Kioni is the managing director of,and 100%shareholder in,Nikio Ltd.Nikio Ltd has no other employees. For the year ending 5 April 2024,Nikio Ltd's tax adjusted trading profit, after taking account of director's remuneration and employer's class 1 national insurance contribution (NIC),is forecast to be f100,000. Nikio Ltd will pay Kioni gross director's remuneration of £47,500 and dividends of £68,000 for the tax year 2023-24.Kioni does not have any other income. Based on these figures,the tax and NIC for Kioni and Nikio Ltd for the year ending 5April 2024 willbe: Kioni f Income tax 32,145 Employee class 1 NIC 4,192 Nikio Ltd f Employer class 1 NIC 5,299 Corporation tax 22,750 Kioni is concerned that she has been saving for her retirement,so she is therefore planning to make a gross pension contribution of £20,000 during the tax year 2023-24.However,Kioni is unsure whether the pension contribution should be made by Nikio Ltd or made personally by her: (1) If the pension contribution is made by Nikio Ltd,the company will make a pension contribution of f20,000 into a company pension scheme on Kioni’s behalf. (2) If the pension contribution is made by Kioni personally,Nikio Ltd will pay her additional director's remuneration of £20,000 for the tax year 2023-24,and Kioni will then make a personal pension contribution of f20,000(gross). 1. 第一种方案，公司给员工投入养老金。 雇主给员工投入的职业养老金对于员工来说是免税福利，所以员工的个人所得税不变。 (0.5分) 员工和雇主需要缴纳的class 1 NIC不受影响。 (0.5分) 雇主给员工投入的职业养老金可以抵减公司的经营收入，所以£20,000可以抵减 tax adjusted trading profit,从而影响企业所得税的计算。 (0.5分)

2. 第二种方案这笔养老金员工需要自己支付 personal pension contribution, 公 司 发放remuneration f20,000。 (1)员工总共的非储蓄收入变为47,500+20,000。(0.5分) (2)员工总共的股息收入是f68,000,题中已知条件。(0.5分) ( 3 ) 题 中 存 在 gross personal pension contribution, 会 影 响 adjusted net income 的计算，进而影响PA 的计算，以及basic rate limit=37,700+20,000=57,700 和 higher rate limit=125,140+20,000=145,140 。(2分 ) (4)计算个人所得税，员工有£67,500的NSI,, 扣 减PA 后应税的NSI 有 67,500-4,820 需要对应non saving income的税率.其中£57,700 对20%的税率， 剩余的部分对应40%的税率。(各0.5分，共1.5分)。 (5)计算个人所得税，员工有f68,000 的股息收入，其中1,000的部分免税， 剩余的部分对应33.75%的税率。(各0.5分，共1分)。 (6)公司发放f20,000 的 remuneration 导致employee Class 1NIC 发生变化。 (1.5分) (7)公司发放f20,000 的 remuneration 导致employer Class 1 NIC 发生变化。 (0.5分) (8)公司给员工发放的remuneration 以及缴纳的employer Class 1 NIC 可 以抵减公司的经营收入，从而影响企业所得税的计算。 ( 1 分 ) 本题的设置为考试中偏难的考题，知识点为基础知识点，但是考法灵活，需要同学们将知识 点融会贯通，建议同学做题的得分在6分左右。 2020-M/J-Q32 本题核心知识点：
