(4 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： INUMCorporation tax liabilities for the years ended 31 March 2023 and 2024 INUM Year ended 31 March 2023 Year ended 31 March 2024 f f Trading profit 138,200 0 Property business income 23,700 0 Chargeable gain 0 0 161,900 0 Trading loss (69,324) 0 Qualifying charitable donations (1,400) 0 Taxable total profits 91,176 0 Corporation tax at 19% 17,323 0 难易程度：中 解析：本题要求尽早使用亏损，计算出两年的应纳税额，共4分。 y/e 31March 2023年度和y/e 31March 2024年度的情况分别如下： (1)y/e31 March 2023年 度 Trading profit=£138,200,y/e 31 March 2024 年 度Trading loss=£69,324, 亏损应该在Trading profit 行写0,0.5分。 (2)y/e31 March 2023年度 Property business income=f23,700,y/e 31 March 2024年度 Property business loss=f4,400,亏损在Property business income 行写0,由于当年没有 total profit, 因 此property business loss带入到未来年度继续使用，0.5分。 (3)y/e 31March 2023 年 度 Capital loss=f4,900,亏 损 在Capital gain 行写0,由于当年以及 yle 31 March 2024 年度都没有Capital gain, 因此无法使用，capital loss带入到未来年度继续 使用，股票的处置由于IA 的存在，Capital gain=f0,1分 。 以 上 可 算 出total profit。 y/e 31 March 2024年 度Trading lossf69,324用于抵扣过去12个月的total profit,因此抵扣y/e 31March 2023年度的 total profit,1分 。 yle 31 March 2023年 度QCD=£1,400, 用于抵扣当年的 total profit,yle 31 March 2024年度， QCD=£1,600, 产生浪费，0.5分。 汇总得出两年的TTP,y/e31 March 2023年度属于Financial year 2022直接乘19%税率得出 企业所得税，0.5分。 (ii)Calculated the amount of unused losses or payments which Mooncake Ltd can carry forward to be utilized in the year ending 31March 2024. 题目类型：excel 答案：Carry forward to the year ending 31 March 2024 ONLINE DELIVE f Trading loss 0 Property business loss 4,400 Capital loss(brought Forword from 31 March 2023) 4,900 Qualifying charitable donations 0 难易程度： 易 解 析 ： Trading loss 已用完，0.5分。 上一年度的 Capital loss f4,900可以带到未来，注意IA 不能产生资本亏损，0.5分。 Property business loss f4,400可以带到未来，0.5分。 QCD 未用完，但不能往后带，0.5分。 2021-S/D Q31 本题核心知识点： 1、个税经营收入金额调整和个人所得税的计算 2、国民保险的计算 3、税务筹划 You should assume that today's date is 15 December 2023. Jade is self-employed and is normally subject to income tax at the higher rate of 40%.However, because of some exceptionally large one-off contracts,Jade has forecast that her trading profit for the year ended 5 April 2024 will exceed £200,000,meaning she will pay income tax at the additional rate of 45%for the tax year 2023/24. Jade is going to undertake four measures aimed at reducing her income tax liability and national insurance contributions(NICs)for the tax year 2023/24: Employment of daughter Jade's daughter,Emerald,has recently returned to the United Kingdom after travelling overseas. She currently has no income for the tax year 2023/24.For the three-month period ended 5 April 2024,Emerald will be employed by Jade's business at a gross monthly salary of £2,000.This salary is reasonable in relation to the duties that will be performed by Emerald. Capital expenditure Bonus Jade was planning to purchase new office equipment for £14,000 on 10 April 2023.This will be her only capital expenditure in the tax year 2023/24. Bonus Jade has one key employee who was largely responsible for obtaining the large contracts.This employee,who has a gross annual salary of £65,000,will be paid of 10,000 on 1 April 2024. Drawings Jade was planning to take f100,000 out of the business as drawings during the tax year 2023/24, but willinstead take reduced drawings of £80,000. Requirement (a)Briefly explain the difference between tax evasion and tax avoidance. (2marks) 题目类型：word 答 案： Difference between taxevasion and tax avoidance Tax evasion is illegal and involves the reduction of tax liabilities by not providing information to which HM Revenue and Customs(HMRC)is entitled,or providing HMRC with deliberately false information. In contrast,tax avoidance involves the minimisation of tax liabilities by the use of any lawful means. 难易程度： 易 解析： 本题主要考查避税与逃税的区别，共2分。 (a)要求简单解释 tax avoidance 以 及 tax evasion 的差别，属于概念背诵的简单问题， tax avoidance 和 tax evasion各1分。(2分) 知识点是较为简单的基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在2分。 (b)Calculate the income tax payable and class 1 NICs suffered by Emerald for the tax year 2023/24. (2marks) 题目类型：word 答案：Income tax payable and class 1 NICs suffered by Emerald Emerald will not have any income tax liability for 2023/24 because her salary of f6,000 (£2,000×3)is less than the personal allowance of f12,570. Employee class 1 NICs will be:(E6,000-(£12,570×3/12))×12%=f343 难易程度： 中 解析： (b)问要求计算 Emerald 的个人所得税以及自己支付的国民保险金额。由于个人工资少于PA, 故该税务年度不用交个人所得税。 Class 1 employee的计算需要时间分摊，即工资3个月， f12,570 这个临界值也要乘以3/12,超额部分乘以对应的比率。(2分) 知识点是较为简单的基础知识点，但是考法相对灵活，建议同学做题的得分应该在2分。 (c) Calculate Jade's overall saving of income tax and class4 NICs for the tax year 2023/24 if she undertakes the four tax planning measures.(Note:You should show by how much each of the four measures will reduce Jade's trading profit and the resulting tax and class 4 NIC saving for Jade. (6marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Jade's overall saving f Emerald Salary f£2,000×3 6,000 Employer class 1 NIC (E6,000-(f9,100×3/12))×13.8% 514 Capital allowance AIA 14,000 Key employee Bonus 10,000 Employer class 1 NIC £10,000×13.8% 1,380 Drawings 0 31,894 Income tax saving £31,894×45% 14,352 Class 4 NICs saving f31,894×2% 638 难易程度：难 解析： (c)问计算4种不同规划下对trading profit 以及个人所得税和国民保险的影响，共6分。 对于trading profit的影响如下： (1)Merald 的工资属于合理水平，故可以全额扣除，为她支付的Class 1 employer 也可扣 除，要注意Merald 只工作了三个月，要将临界值做时间分摊，f9,100 要乘以3/12。(1分) ( 2 ) 购 买new office equipment,可 以 使 用AIA 折旧方法，AIA 的计算限额是£1,000,000, 故可全额抵扣。(1分) (3)给关键员工额外支付一笔 bonus 可扣除，相应多交的Class 1 employer 也可以扣除，由 于年工资为E65,000, 已超过临界值f£9,100,故多交的部分直接乘以13.8%的比率。(1分) (4)Jade 自己 take drawings 部分不允许税前扣除，所以拿多拿少都不影响 trading profit的 计算。(1分) 然后计算tax saving的部分，用trading profit 降低的部分f31,894, 乘以45%税率得到个人所 得税少交的部分。由于Jade本来的trading profit超过£200,000,超过650,270的部分计算class 4 NIC应该乘2%,所以计算减少的class 4 NIC时要用减少的trading profit f31,894乘 以 2 % , 得到Class 4 NICs少交的部分。(2分) 本问的设置为考试中 trading profit 计算的调整问题，以及不同方案对于个税和国民保险的影 响。知识点是较为简单的基础知识点，但是考法相对灵活，建议同学做题的得分应该在4 2021-S/D-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1.accommodation 及 use of asset等福利计算 2.partnership 中的亏损分配

stem_zh: 3. 个税的计算 This scenario relates to four requirements. Amanda's taxable income for the tax year 2023/24 is: f Employment income 58,270 Property income 2,000 60,270 Deductions for loss relief and qualifying interest payments (3,200) 57,070 Personal allowance (12,570) Taxable income 44,500 Living accommodation For the period 1 November 2023 to 5 April 2024 Amanda's employer provided her with living accommodation. Her employer had purchased the property on 10 February 2021 for £174,000 and it was valued at £192,000 on 6 April 2023 and at £194,000 on 1 November 2023.Improvements costing £8,000 were made to the property during May 2022.The annual value of the property is f6,300. The property was furnished by Amanda's employer during August 2023 at a cost f12,400. The taxable benefit in respect of the living accommodation is included in the employment income figure of £58,270. Partnership loss Amanda has been in partnership with Benny and Cotton since 1 April 2010.For the year ended 31 March 2024,the partnership made a tax-adjusted trading loss of £10,800. Until31 May 2022,profits and losses were shared equally.Since 1 June 2022,profits and losses have been shared 15%to Amanda,60%to Benny and 25%to Cotton. Amanda has claimed her share of the partnership's loss against her total income for the tax year 2023/24 and this is included in the deductions for loss relief and interest payments figure f3,200. Gift aid donations During the tax year 2023/24,Amanda made charitable gift aid donations totaling f640(net). PAYE For each the twelve months of the tax year 2023/24,Amanda's employer deducted f900 ofincome tax from Amanda's monthly earnings under PAYE. Child benefit Amanda received child benefit f2,547 during the tax year 2023/24. Amanda's husband For the tax year 2023/24,Amanda's husband had a taxable income of f21,000. (2021 S/DQ32) Requirements: (a)Calculate Amanda's taxable benefit for the tax year 2023/24 in respect of the living accommodation provided by her employer. (5marks) (b)Calculate Amanda's partnership loss relief claim for the tax year 2023/24. (2marks) (c)Calculate the income tax and child benefit income tax charge payable by,or repayable to, Amanda for the tax year 2023/24.(5 marks) (d)Calculate the overall income tax saving and reduction in child benefit income tax charge for the tax year 2023/24 if the property income of £2,000 had been received by Amanda's husband rather than by Amanda.(3marks) (15 marks) (a)Calculate Amanda's taxable benefit for the tax year 2023/24 in respect of the living accommodation provided by her employer. (5marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Amanda's taxable benefit on living accommodation f f General charge Annual value 6,300 Additional charge Cost 10 February 2020 174,000 Improvements 8,000 182,000 Limit (75,000) 107,000 ×2.25% 2,408 8,708 Accommodation benefit(Time apportions ×5/12) 3,628 Furniture ×5/12 12,400×20%×5/12 1,033 难易程度 ：易 解 析 ： 本题考查Accommodation 福利及use of asset 福利的计算，共5分。 1)Accommodation benefit 的第一部分 general charge 用 annual value,(1分 ) 因为成本大于75,000,所以需要计算additional charge,在计算时，购买房屋与第一次给员工 使用的时长没有超过6年，所以直接使用房子的购买成本。(1分) 2)Improvement cost 发生在本税务年度之前所以需要加入到成本的计算。(0.5分) 3)Additional charge用(174,000+8,000-75,000)×2.25%的计算。(0.5分) 没有全年提供Accommodation 故在最后计算时需要乘时间比例5/12。(0.5分) 4)使用家具会产生use of asset福利，需要按20%的市场价值计算(1分),没有全年提供 故在最后计算时需要乘时间比例。(0.5分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在4分以 上 。 (b)Calculate Amanda's partnership loss relief claim for the tax year 2023/24. (2marks) 题目类型：excel 答 案 ： Amanda-Share of partnership loss f 1 April 2023 to 31 May 2023 10,800×2/12×1/3 600 1 June 2023 to 31 March 2024 10,800×10/12×15% 1,350 1,950 难易程度 ：易
explanation_zh: 本题考查partnership loss 的分配，共2分。 在本会计期间发生了分配比例的变化，故分成变化前1 April 2023 to 31 May 2023(1分 ) , 和变化后1 June 2023 to 31 March 2024(1分)分别计算。 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在2分。 (c)Calculate the income tax and child benefit income tax charge payable by,or repayable to, Amanda for the tax year 2023/24. (5 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Amanda-Income tax repayable NSI 38,500×20% 7,700 6,000×40% 2,400 44,500 10,100 Tax suffered at source-PAYE(900×12) (10,800) Income tax repayable (700) Basic rate limit 37,700+800(640÷80%) Child benefit income tax charge f ANI(57,070-800) 56,270 ((56,270-50,000)/100)% 62% 2,547×62% 1,579 难易程度： 中 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 解 析 ： 本题考查 tax payable 和 child benefit income tax charge的计算，共5分。 进行了gift aid donation 后就会使得 basic rate limit 变大，37700+ gross gift aid donation 。(1 分) Income tax liability 计算时，NSI 在 basic rate limit以下的用20%税率(0.5分),以上用40% 税率(0 . 5分)。 Income tax payable/repayable 需要用income tax liability减PAYE 。(1 分 ) ANI 超过50,000并且收到child benefit 故会有child benefit income tax charge,用 ANI 计算 出 百 分 比 ( 1 分 ) ,child benefit乘百分比就是child benefit income tax charge。(1分 ) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在3分。 (d)Calculate the overall income tax saving and reduction in child benefit income tax charge for the tax year 2023/24 if the property income of f2,000 had been received by Amanda's husband rather than by Amanda. (3marks) 题目类型：excel 答 案 ： Overall saving f Amanda tax saving Income tax saving 2,000 at 40% 800 Reduction in child benefit income tax charge 2,547×20%(2,000/100) 509 Husband tax cost 2,000×20% (400) Overall saving 909 CAIIU ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 难易程度：难 解 析 ： 本题考查减少收入可能产生的减税，共3分。 站在Amanda 的角度： 租赁收入减少2,000那么个税会节省2,000×40%。(1分) 租赁收入减少2,000,ANI 减少2,000,Child benefit income tax charge可以减少Child benefit 的20%。(1分) 站在Amanda 丈夫的角度： 租赁收入增加了2,000,因为他是basic rate tax payer所以税收增加2,000×20%。(1分) 本题的设置相对灵活，属于税务筹划的范畴，有点难度，建议同学做题的得分应该在1分以 上。 2021-S/D Q33 本题核心知识点： 1、企业所得税的计算 2、企业资本利得的计算 3、集团rollover relief 的计算 This scenario relates to four requirements. Fogo Ltd has one 100%subsidiary,Netta Ltd. Fogo Ltd During the year ended 30 September 2023,Fogo Ltd made the following capital disposals: On 31 October 2022 Fogo Ltd sold an investment property which had been let out to tenants since it was acquired. The investment property was sold to an unconnected company for £625,000.It had cost £500,000 when it was acquired in February 2011. On 4 May 2023 Fogo Ltd sold a freehold warehouse which it had used exclusively in its trade.The warehouse was sold to an unconnected company for £560,000.It had cost Fogo Ltd £100,000 when it was acquired in September 2002. On 19 September 2023 Fogo Ltd sold a 4%shareholding in an unconnected trading company,resulting in a capital loss of £25,000. Indexation factors: September 2002 to December 2017 0.593 February 2011 to December 2017 0.269 Netta Ltd For the year ended 30 September 2023,Netta Ltd has a draft tax adjusted trading profit of£180,000. This figure has been calculated correctly but does not include interest payable or receivable. Interest payable On 1 October 2022,Netta Ltd borrowed f£1,000,000 from a bank at an annual interest rate of 5%.During the year ended 30 September 2023,the interest payable of £50,000 was in respect of the following: (1)Interest on f550,000 of the loan to acquire fixed plant and machinery for use in its factory.The fixed plant and machinery have an expected useful life of 15 years. (2)Interest on 450,000 of the loan to acquire a 3%shareholding in a trading company called Jona Ltd Interest receivable Netta Ltd's financial statements for the year ended 30 September 2023 showed interest receivable from investments of f35,000 of which f25,000 was received during the year and £10,000 was accrued on 30 September 2023.There was no accrual brought forward at 1 October 2022. (2021 S/DQ33) Requirements (a)Calculate the net chargeable gains of Fogo Ltd,before any claim for group rollover relief, for the year ended 30 September 2023.(5 marks) 题目类型：word 答案： Investment property f Proceeds 625,000 Cost (500,000) Unindexed gain 125,000 Less indexation allowance (£500,000 × 0.269=134,500),so restricted to (125,000 ) Gain 0 Warehouse f Proceeds 560,000 Cost (100,000) Unindexed gain 460,000 Less indexation allowance (£100,000×0.593) (59,300) Gain 400,700 Net gains f Investment property 0 Warehouse 400,700 Shares (25,000) Net chargeable gain 375,700 难易程度：易 解析：(a) 问考察Fogo Ltd 处置investment property 、warehouse 和 Shares 的净利得，共5分。 处置 Investment property: 用收入减去成本得到Unindexed gain f125,000,Indexation allowance f134,500,大于£125,000, 应注意，减Indexation allowance不能造成loss, 也就是最小减为0.因此处置investment property 的利得应该为0。(indexation allowance 1分，其他0.5分) 处置warehouse: 用收入减去成本，然后再减去Indexation allowance(1分),正常计算得出利得。(收入、成 本各0.5分) 处置shares 资本损失£25,000 (0.5分)。 将这三笔处置加在一起即为总的净利得。 (b)In respect of the disposal by Fogo Ltd of its freehold warehouse on 4May 2023: (i)Give TWO reasons why Fogo Ltd can make a group rollover relief claim and explain which of Netta Ltd's asset acquisitions will qualify and which will not qualify as a replacement asset.(4 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案： Group rollover relief Fogo Ltd and Netta Ltd are in a chargeable gains group because Netta Ltd is a 100%subsidiary of Fogo Ltd. The warehouse is a qualifying asset and was used exclusively in Fogo Ltd's trade. Netta Ltd's asset acquisitions took place within one year before and three years after the disposal. The fixed plant and machinery is a qualifying replacement asset which is used in Netta Ltd's trade. The shares are not business assets. 难易程度：中 解析：(i) 问考察group rollover relief的相关知识，共4分。 Fogo Ltd 可以申请 group rollover relief: 因为Netta Ltd 是Fogo Ltd的100%子公司，这两个公司可以组成资本利得集团； Fogo Ltd 处置的 warehouse 是 qualifying asset 并且是商用的； Netta Ltd 购买的新资产是在旧资产处置的前一年到后三年间购入。 (任意两点可以得2分) 若集团中一家公司处置旧资产，另一家公司购买新资产，新旧资产必须是商用且是以下种类： 土地，房产，或固定不可移动机器设备，可以享受 Rollover relief。 因此fixed plant and machinery是 qualifying asset(1分 ) ,shares 不是qualifying asset(1分)。 (ii)Calculate the amount of the gain which can be deferred if a claim for group rollover relief is made and explains when the deferred gain will become chargeable.(3 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案： Deferred gain The amount of the gain which can be deferred is f390,700(f400,700-(560,000-550,000) The deferred gain is frozen and will become chargeable on the earliest of the following events: the plant and machinery is sold; the plant and machinery is no longer used in Netta Ltd's trade; and ten years firom the date of acquisition of the plant and machinery. 难易程度：易 解析：(ii) 问需要计算如果申请 group rollover relief, 递延的利得是多少，共3分。 处置 warehouse 的收入是£560,000,购买fixed plant and machinery的价格是f550,000, 因此 gain taxed now 是£10,000。(a) 问算出的处置 warehouse 的 gain before releif是f400,700, 如 果现在申请使用group rollover relief, 则递延的利得应当是 gain before relief 和 gain taxed now 的差额，即£400,700-f10,000=£390,700(1 分)。 租赁的资产及固定的机器设备为Depreciating asset。当购买的新资产为Depreciating asset, 新资产成本无需调整。旧资产处置产生的资本利得递延至三个时间当中较早的时间交税： · 新资产处置日 ·新资产停止商用日 · 新资产买来使用满十年(2分) (c)Calculate the taxable total profits of Netta Ltd for the year ended 30 September 2023. Note:Your calculation should commence with the draft tax adjusted trading profit of £180,000 adjusting for the trading interest payable and showing the total non-trade loan relationship income. (3marks) (15 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Netta Ltd-Taxable total profits forthe year ended 30 September 2023 f Draft tax adjusted trading profit 180,000 Less interest payable on loan used to: Acquire fixed plant and machinery (£50,000×£550,000/E1,000,000) (27,500) Revised tax adjusted trading income 152,500 Non-trade loan relationship income Non-trade loan interest receivable 35,000 Non-trade loan interest payable (£50,000×£450,000/E1,000,000) (22,500) 12,500 Taxable total profit 165,000 难易程度：中 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 解析：(c) 问 考 察Netta Ltd 的 taxable total profits 的计算，共3分。 基于draft tax adjusted trading profit 的E180,000 开始算，买fixed plant and machinery 是经营目 的，因此贷款产生的利息应当从经营收入中减去，即减去 f50,000×f550,000/E1,000,000=£27,500(1分)。 而贷款购买其他公司股权是非经营目的，因此该笔贷款的利息应该在investment income 中 减去，即减去£50,000×f450,000/£1,000,000=£22,500(1 分)。 £35,000的投资利息收入同样应计入investment income(1分)。 将调整后的 tax adjusted trading income加上非经营贷款产生的利息，就是Netta Ltd 的 taxable total profits。 2022-M/JQ31 本题核心知识点： 1、个人所得税 2、国民保险 3、企业所得税 4、税务筹划 You should assume that today's date is 25 March 2023. You are a trainee Chartered Certified Accountant dealing with the tax affairs of Fleur.Fleur has been self-employed since 6April 2008 and has previously asked you to calculate whether it would be beneficial to incorporate her business on 6 April 2023.The new limited company was to be called Flower Ltd. Fleur operating as a sole trader Her forecast tax adjusted trading profit was £100,000 for the year ending 5April 2024. Fleur operating as a limited company Flower Ltd's forecast tax adjusted trading profit for the year ending 5 April 2024 was £100,000. After taking account of Fleur's director's remuneration of f35,000 and the related employer's class 1 national insurance contributions(NICs)of £3,574,this was to be f£61,426(£100,000-f35,000- £3,574).Fleur would then have withdrawn f45,000 of the company's profits as dividends.Fleur has no other source of income. Based on these figures,you established that there was no tax benefit to incorporating Fleur's business since the tax and NIC costs were higher.The suppoiting tax liabilities and NICs which you had correctly calculated were: Operate as a sole trader f Operate as a limited company f Income tax 27,432 Income tax 15,769 Class 2 NICs 179 Employee class 1 NICs 2,692 Class 4NICs 4,388 Employer's class 1 NICs 3,574 Total 31,999 Corporation tax 12,528 Total 34,563 Change to the forecast figures Fleur has just signed a contract with a new customer and has revised her forecast for the year ending 5 April 2024. Operating as a sole trader She now forecasts that her tax adjusted trading profit for the year ending 5 April 2024 will be £135,000 rather than f100,000. Operating as a limited company The forecast tax adjusted trading profit for the year ending 5 April 2024 willbe f135,000 rather than £100,000.Director's remuneration will remain at £35,000,but Fleur will increase the dividends taken from Flower Ltd to £70,000. Fleur wants to know whether the additional £35,000 of profit will now mean it is beneficial to incorporate her business on 6April 2023. (2022 MJQ31) Required Based on the increased tax adjusted trading profit of £135,000,calculate revised figures for each of the seven tax and national insurance contributions (NICs)figures already calculated for the year ending 5 April 2024,and show if there will be an overall cost or saving if she incorporates the business on 6 April 2023. Notes: 1.For each of the seven tax and NIC figures already calculated,you should show the revised amounts,stating if any remain unchanged. 2.For the income tax figures,you are expected to produce full income tax computations. 3.You should assume that the rate of corporation tax remains unchanged. (10 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Remain self-employed f£ Income tax(working 1) 46,953 Class 2 NICs(unchanged) 179 Class 4 NICs(4,388+(35,000 at 2%) 5,088 Total 52,220 Working 1-Income tax f Trading profit 135,000 Personal allowance 0 Taxable income 135,000 Income tax f 37,700 at 20% 7,540 87,440 at 40% 34,976 9,860 at 45% 4,437 135,000 Income tax liability 46,953 Incorporation f Income tax(working 2) 25,331 Employee class 1 NICs(unchanged) 2,692 Employer's class 1 NICs(unchanged) 3,574 Corporation tax(15,769+(35,000 at 26.5%)) 25,044 Total 56,641 Working 2-Income tax f£ Director's remuneration(NSI) 35,000 Dividend income(DI) 70,000 105,000 Personal allowance(working 3) (10,070) Taxable income 94,930 Income tax f NSI:24,930(35,000-10,070)at 20% 4,986 DI:1,000 at 0% 0 11,770(37,700-24,930-1,000)at 8.75% 1,030 57,230(70,000-1,000-11,770)at 33.75% 19,315 94,930 Income tax liability 25,331 Working 3-Personal allowance Personal allowance 12,570 Reduction((105,000-100,000)/2) (2,500) Reduced personal allowance 10,070 Conclusion Given the increased forecast trading profit of 135,000,incorporating her business will now result in an overall tax and NIC cost of f4,421(56,641-52,220)for Fleur. 难易程度：难 解 析 ： 本题考察纳税筹划的相关内容，主要包括个人所得税、国民保险NIC 和企业所得税的计算， 共10分。 当Fleur在year ended 5April 2024赚取的贸易利润为 f100,000时，站在Fleur的角度上，作 为个体经营户 sole trader需要缴纳的个税、NIC, 与成立公司incorporation 需要缴纳的个税、 企税、NIC 的总成本进行对比后，发现这时 Fleur 作为sole trader经营，总成本更少，更节 税。这是题干中已经帮你计算好的，这里注意：不需要再去计算检验题干中数据。 而题目要求同学计算的是：如果在year ended 5 April2024 赚取的贸易利润增加£35,000(从 £100,000增加至f135,000), 是否成立 corporation 更节税? 题目中特别强调题表格中已经有的7个项目，所以做题时可以参考题干中的框架来列示。 作为Sole trader: (1)个税：只有收入 trading profit f135,000(0.5分),PA 为0(0.5分),最终个税结果为 £46,953(0.5分)。注意：只有成立了公司才有 dividend income。 (2)Class 2 NIC:老板给自己缴纳的，计税基础是 f3.45/week。这里金额不变，还是£179, 因为依旧是经营完整的1年。(0.5分) (3)Class 4 NIC: 老板给自己缴纳的，计税基础是trading profit。这里由于贸易利润增加至 £135,000,所以在之前 f4,388的基础上，要额外加上E35,000×2%,最终结果为£5,088。(1 分)。注意：用2%是因为该人的trading profit 已经超过 f50,270。 作为Corporation: (1)个税：两笔收入：高管薪酬 f35,000(0.5分),股息£70,000(0.5分)。由于net income> £100,000,所以PA 需要从£12,570调减至£10,070(1分)。NSI 和 DI 两种不同类型的收入， 税率不同，注意计算先NSI 后 DI, 最终个税结果为£25,331(2分)。 (2)Employee Class 1 NIC: 员工给自己缴纳的，计税基础是员工的cash earnings。由于这 道题中，director's remuneration没有变化，所以cash earnings 也没有变化，因此该项不变， 依旧是 f2,692。(0.5分)注意： dividend income 不属于cash earnings。 (3)Employer's Class 1 NIC: 老板给员工缴纳的，计税基础也是员工的cash earnings。该项 不变，依旧是 f3,574, 原因同(2)。(0.5分) (4)企税：增加的 f35,000 的 trading profit 使企业的TTP 增加，所以企税也会在原先£15,69 的基础上，调增 f35,000×26.5%, 最终企税结果为£25,044。(1分) 所以，作为个体经营户的Total tax and NIC=£52,220;成 立公司的 tax and NIC=£56,641。 成立公司要多交 f4,421(56,641-52,220)的税和国民保险，所以作为个体户经营更有利。(1 分 ) ONLINE DELIVE 本题的设置为考试中偏难的考题，知识点虽为基础知识点，但是考法灵活，需要同学们将知 识点融会贯通，建议同学该题得分在6分左右。 2022-M/J-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1、雇佣收入和合伙企业亏损分配的计算。 2、PAYE 系统的相关知识点考察。 3、个税汇算清缴知识点的考察。 This scenario relates to three requirements. Poppy is employed by Zune plc and she is also a member of a partnership.The following information is available: Employment (1)During the tax year 2023/24,Poppy was paid a gross annual salary of f65,000 in respect of her employment with Zune plc. (2)During the period from 1 August 2023 to 5 April 2024,Zune plc provided Poppy with a diesel powered car which has a list price of £21,800.The car cost Zune plc £20,600,and it has an official CO₂emission rate of 70 grams per kilometre.The car does not meet the real driving emissions 2 (RDE2)standard.Poppy was not provided with any fuel for private use. (3)Throughout the tax year 2023/24,Zune plc provided Poppy with two mobile telephones.The telephones had each cost £480 when purchased by the company in March 2023. (4)All of the taxable benefits provided by Zune plc to Poppy are payrolled. Partnership (1)Poppy has been in partnership with Rose and Teasel since 6 April 2015,but Teasel resigned as a partner on 6July 2023.The partners have always shared profits equally. (2)For the year ended 5 April 2024,the partnership had a tax adjusted trading loss of £19,500. This figure is before taking account of capital allowances. (3)The only item of plant and machinery owned by the partnership is a car with a CO₂emission rate of 90 grams per kilometre.The car was used by Poppy and 70%of the mileage was for private journeys.The written down value of the car as at 6 April 2023 was f8,400.The car was sold on 5 April 2024 for f5,400 and was not replaced. UK Government securities(gilts) On 1 January 2024,Poppy purchased,for £50,000,gilts with a nominal value of f40,000.The gilts paid interest at the rate of 3%,with interest paid half-yearly on 30 June and 31 December based on the nominal value.Poppy sold the gilts on 31 March 2024 for £50,300(including accrued interest). Balancing payment for tax year 2022/23 Poppy filed her self-assessment tax return for the tax year 2022/23 by the filing date,but did not make the balancing payment of f£2,600 until 31 August 2024.She was not required to make any payments on account. Required (a)Assuming that Poppy claims loss relief against her total income for the tax year 2023/24, calculate her taxable income for this tax year. (10marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Poppy-Taxable income 2023/24 £ Employment income Salary 65,000 Car benefit(21,800×(19%+4%)×8/12) 3,343 Mobile telephone(480×20%) 96 68,439 Savings income(40,000 at 3%×3/12) 300 68,739 Loss relief(working 1) (9,350) Personal allowance (12,570) Taxable income 46,819 Working 1-Trading loss f Trading loss 19,500 Balancing allowance (8,400-5,400)×30%) 900 Revised trading loss 20,400 Profit share 6April 2023 to 5 July 2023 20,400×3/12×1/3 1,700 6 July 2023 to 5 April 2024 20,400×9/12×1/2 7,650 9,350 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 难易程度：中 解析： (a)问考察个税的应纳税所得额的计算和合伙人的亏损分配，共10分。 作为雇员： (1)Poppy 的工资收入f65,000。(0.5分 ) (2)公司提供小汽车给Poppy 私用，要计算 car benefit, 通过taxable benefit增加employment income 。 其 中Rate:16%+(70-55)/5×1%+4%=23%, 因为是不符合 RDE2 的柴油车要记得加 上额外4%的 Rate 。(1 分 )Car benefit=23%×21,800×8/12=£3,343, 计算中需要注意使用list price, 而不是actual payment,同时考虑私用在本税年只占了8个月，需要时间分配。(1分) (3)公司给Poppy 提供了两部手机私用，因为第一台手机私用是免税福利，并且两部手机 的金额相同，所以只有第二部手机按use of asset去计算福利，等于£480×20%=f96。(1分 ) (4)Poppy 持有国债要计算savings income, 24.1.1-24.3.31实际持有时长为3个月，所以 是£40,000×3%×3/12,需要注意的是，用国债面值计算利息而不是买价，用accrual basis 而 不是cash basis 。(1.5 分 ) (5)正常计算PA, 因为本题ANI 小于100K, 所以PA 是标准的E12,570 。(0.5 分 ) 作为合伙人： (1)在调整税务折旧CA 之前的tax adjusted trading loss为19,500 . (0 . 5分) (2)需要计提税务折旧的是二氧化碳排放量90g/km 的小汽车， Poppy 作为合伙人私用了 该小汽车，所以属于， Private used asset,需要单列，单列资产处置，余额需要清空，会产 生BA/BC,, 资产账面余额£8,400,处置的价格是f5,400, 卖亏了，所以是BA (加总在capital allowance中),且只有商用部分可以享受税务折旧，即(8,400-5,400)×30%=£900。(1.5分) (3)Teasel 在2023.7.6退出合伙企业，所以Trading loss分配比例发生的时间点就是2023.7.6, 原合伙人退出的前后都是平均分配Trading loss。在Teasel退出前，也就是2023.4.6-2023.7.6 这三个月Poppy 分配到的trading loss为f20,400×3/12×1/3=£1,700, 在Teasel 退出后的剩下九 个 月 ，Poppy 分配的trading loss为f20,400×9/12×1/2=f7,650, 所以本税年从合伙企业分配的 Trading loss 为f1,700+f7,650=9,350(2 分 ) (4)题目假设Poppy 的 trading loss relief选择了current year loss relief,那么可以抵减 Total income before PA,以最大值£9,350来抵减。(0.5分) (b)Explain how Poppy's income tax liability in respect of her taxable benefits for the tax year 2023/24 will have been collected,and if any forms containing details of these benefits will have been reported to HM Revenue and Customs(HMRC). (2 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： (1)Because Poppy's benefits are payrolled,the related income tax liability will have been collected under PAYE along with the tax on her salary. (2)Payrolled benefits do not have to be reported to HMRC on form P11D or otherwise. 难易程度：中 解 析 ： (b)问考察PAYE 系统的相关申报，共2分。 (1)题干里明确说了 Poppy 所有的应税福利都是通过薪酬系统支付的，所以福利相关的个 人所得税税负也会跟工资一起在PAYE 系统下征收。(1分) (2)在薪酬系统下支付的福利不需要额外再去填写P11D 提交给税务局。(1分) (c)Advise Poppy of the interest and penalties that will be charged by HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC)as a consequence of her not making the balancing payment for the tax year 2022/23 until 31 August 2023. (3 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： (1)Interest will be charged for the period 31 January 2024 to 31 August 2024,so the charge will be f99 (2,600×6.5%×7/12) (2)Two penalties off130(E2,600 at 5%)will be imposed on the balancing payment,one when it is one month late and the other when it is six months late. 难易程度：中 解 析 ： (c)问考察个税汇算清缴晚交，共3分。 汇算清缴的补交税款，若出现滞纳，则罚款和罚息均有。 (1)2022/23税年的 Balancing payment 正常缴纳的期限是到2024 . 1 . 31,所以从 2024.1.31-2024.8.31一共滞纳了7个月，需缴纳的罚息为£2,600×6.5%×7/12=f99。(1.5分 ) (2)罚款在逾期1个月之内不罚款，在逾期1 - 6个月罚5%的未缴税款，罚款为 £2,600×5%=£130,在逾期6-12个月继续追加罚5%的未缴税款，再增加罚款E2,600×5%=£130。 (1.5分) 本题的设置比较常规，知识点都为常考基础知识点，但是有考察PAYE 系统，较为冷门，建 议同学做题的得分争取在10分以上。 2022-M/J-Q33 本题核心知识点：

stem_zh: 2. 税务折旧的资产判断以及计算 3.property income 的计算 Mixture Ltd is a large company and therefore has to make quarterly instalment payments in respect ofits corporation tax liability. For the year ended 31 March 2024,Mixture Ltd has taxable total profits of f470,000 and dividends from a non-group company of f45,000.The company had the same level of profits for the year ended 31March 2023. Mixture Ltd has had two 51%group companies for many years. Capital expenditure Mixture Ltd incurred the following capital expenditure during the year ended 31 March 2024: (1)A new freehold office building was purchased.The purchase price included £22,200 for a staircase linking the two floors of the building,f16,400 for sprinkler equipment and the fire alarm system f18,700 for doors and windows and £27,100 for the ventilation system. (2)Machinery was purchased for f76,600.At the same time,a further f9,200 was spent on building alterations which were necessary for the installation ofthis machinery. (3)Movable partition walls were purchased for f33,800.Mixture Ltd uses these to divide up its open plan offices,and the partition walls are moved around on a regular basis. (4)A new decorative wall was constructed around the boundary of Mixture Ltd's business premises at a cost of f44,700 Property business income Mixture Ltd lets out a warehouse which is surplus to requirements,although the property was empty between 1 September 2023 and 28 February 2024.The following income and expenditure relates to the year ended 31 March 2024 Date received/(paid) f 1 January 2023 Insurance for the year ended 31 December 2023 (1,700) 28 March 2023 Rent for the quarter ended 30 June 2023 7,800 4 July 2023 Rent for July and August 2023 5,200 5 December 2023 Advertising for tenants (900) 1 January 2024 Insurance for the year ended 31 December 2024 (1,900) 1 March 2024 Premium for the grant of a five-year lease 18,000 1 March 2024 Rent for the quarter ended 31 May 2024 8,400 Required (a)(i)Explain why Mixture Ltd is classed as a large company for the year ended 31 March 2024. (2marks) (ii)Calculate Mixture Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 31 March 2024,and explain when this will have been paid. Note:You should assume that Mixture Ltd's profits accrued evenly throughout the year. (3marks) (b)List the expenditure incurred by Mixture Ltd during the year ended 31 March 2024 which will have qualified as plant and machinery for capital allowance purposes. Notes: 1.Your answer should indicate by the use ofzero(0)any item of expenditure which does not qualify as plant and machinery. 2.You are not expected to calculate the capital allowances or to state the rate of capital allowance available. (4 marks) (c)Explain why a company may wish to make a short-life asset election for capital allowance purposes. (2 marks) (d)Calculate the property business income figure which will have been included in Mixture Ltd's taxable total profits of £470,000 for the year ended 31 March 2024. (4 marks) (Total=15marks) (a)(i)Explain why Mixture Ltd is classed as a large company for the year ended 31 March 2024. (2 marks) 题目类型：w ord 答 案 ： (i)Mixture Ltd is classed as a large company for the year ended 31 March 2024 because its profits of f515,000(470,000+45,000)exceed the threshold of £500,000(1,500,000/3). 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考察大公司的判断方法，共2分。 由 于 augmented profit=Taxable Total Profit+Dividends from Non-51%group companies 470,000+45,000=£515,000,Limit=£1,500,000×m/12×1/n,2 家关联公司加上自己一共是 n=3 个，所以临界值=1,500,000÷3=f500,000。augmented profit=£515,000>E500,000,所 以 Mixture Ltd 为大公司。(2分) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该为2分。 (ii)Calculate Mixture Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 31 March 2024,and explain when this will have been paid. Note:You should assume that Mixture Ltd's profits accrued evenly throughout the year. (3marks) 题目类型：w ord 答 案 ： (ii)(1)Mixture Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 31 March 2024 is £117,500 (470,000 at 25%). (2)The company will have paid this in four quarterly installments of f29,375(117,500/4). (3)The instalments will have been due on the 14th of October 2023,January 2024,April 2024 and July 2024. 难易程度： 易
explanation_zh: 本题考察大公司的企税缴纳税的相关的知识点，共3分。 因 为 augmented profits f515,000>upper limit 250,000/3, 所以企税税款总额的计算使用25%的 税率，TTP(f470,000)×25%=£117,500 。(1 分 ) 因为是大公司，且计税期间为12个月，所以税款分4期支付，每期支付的金额为 £117,500÷4=£29,375。(1分) 支付日是该计税期间开始后的第7个，第10个，第13个，第16个月份的14号。也就是 14th of October 2023,January 2024,April 2023 and July 2024 。(1分 ) 本 题 的 设 置 为 考 试 常 见 模 式 ， 知 识 点 为 常 考 基 础 知 识 点 ， 建 议 同 学 做 题 的 得 分 应 该 在 2 分 以 上。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (b)List the expenditure incurred by Mixture Ltd during the year ended 31 March 2024 which will have qualified as plant and machinery for capital allowance purposes. Notes: 1.Your answer should indicate by the use of zero(0)any item of expenditure which does not qualify as plant and machinery. 2.You are not expected to calculate the capital allowances or to state the rate of capital allowance available. (4 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Expenditure qualifying as plant and machinery f Staircase 0 Sprinkler equipment and fire alarm system 16,400 Doors and windows 0 Ventilation system 27,100 Machinery 76,600 Building alterations 9,200 Movable partition walls 33,800 Decorative wall 0 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 难易程度：中 解析： 本题考察plant and machinery 的定义，共4分。

stem_zh: 1) staircase 是连接两层floor 的，所以算是构筑物，不作为P&M, 写 0 。 2)sprinkler equipment and the fire alarm system属 于P&M, 需计算折旧，加上。 3)Doors and windows算是构筑物，不作为P&M, 写0。 4)ventilation system 属于integral feature 的 P&M, 需计算折旧，加上。 5)Machinery 属于最常见的P&M, 需计算折旧，加上。 6)Building alterations 属于machinery 相关的资本性支出，cost 的一部分，需计算折旧， 加上。 7)Movable partition walls 不是真正的wall, 属于 P&M, 需计算折旧，加上。 8)Decorative wall算是构筑物，不作为P&M, 写 0 。 以上，每点0.5分。 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，但是考法灵活，需要同学们将知识 点融会贯通，建议同学做题的得分应该在3分以上。 (c)Explain why a company may wish to make a short-life asset election for capital allowance purposes. (2marks) 题目类型：w ord 答案： (1)A short life asset election willbe beneficial when an asset is disposed of for less than its tax written down value within eight years of the accounting period in which it was purchased. (2)However,there is no benefit to a short life asset election where the 100%annual investment allowance can be claimed in respect of the asset. (3)The balancing allowance given when the asset is disposed of accelerates the allowances rather than these being given on a reducing balance basis. 难易程度：难
explanation_zh: 本题考察作为短命资产计算折旧的优势，共2分。 如果一个短命资产在购买后8年内以低于账面价值的价格处置，这个时候可以使用BA 折旧 方法全额计入折旧，相较于放在MP 中只能使用WDA, 是更优的，计算的折旧金额更大。 (1分) 但如果本身这个新购入的短命资产可以全额使用AIA 折旧方法，那其实结果没有区别。(1 分 ) 本题的设置为考试不常见的，知识点比较少见，建议同学尽量尝试作答，争取得分。 (d)Calculate the property business income figure which willhave been included in Mixture Ltd's taxable total profits of f470,000 for the year ended 31 March 2024. (4 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Mixture Ltd-property business income for the year ended 31 March 2024 f Premium received 18,000 Less:18,000×2%×(5-1) (1,440) 16,560 Rent receivable(7,800+5,200+(8,400/3)) 15,800 32,360 Advertising (900) Insurance(1,700×9/12+1,900×3/12) (1,750) 29,710 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 考察企业property income 的计算，共4分。 首先要明确，企业计算PBI, 用 的 是accrual basis。 1)Rental income根 据y/e 24.3.31内应计的租金收入，包括7,800(23.4.1-23.6.30)、5,200 (23.7.1-23.8.31)和8,400÷3(24.3.1-24.3.31)(1分) 2)Premium 这边按照公式计算，将部分premium 作为income 入账， 18,000-18,000×2%×(5-1)=f£16,560 。(1.5 分 ) 3)Advertising 费用不存在分摊，全额扣除。(0.5分)

stem_zh: 4) Insurance 根据租赁期2023.4.1-2024.3.31找相应的费用，虽然其中有6个月没有租 客入住，但相关的insurance还是发生了，可以扣除。所以是 1,700×9÷12+1,900×3÷12=f1,750 。(1 分 ) 本题的设置为考试常见模式，知识点为常考基础知识点，建议同学做题的得分应该在3分以 上 。 2022-S/D-Q31 本题核心知识点：

4. 国民保险-National Insurance contribution class 1 This scenario relates to three requirements. You should assume that today's date is 28 March 2023. Alicia is employed by Tusk Ltd,and is currently paid a gross annual salary of f60,000.She is therefore a higher rate taxpayer.Alicia does not have any other income. Tusk Ltd has offered Alicia the choice of either being provided with a company car or alternatively receiving a salary increase and also being paid a mileage allowance for using her private car for business journeys. Regardless of which alternative is chosen,Alicia's new remuneration package will take effect from 6April 2023 and will apply throughout the tax year 2023-24. Company car alternative The car will be petrol-powered with a list price of f22,400.It will have an official CO₂emissions rate of55 grams per kilometre. Tusk Ltd will not provide Alicia with any fuel for private journeys. Under this alternative,Alicia will not run a private car. Salary and mileage allowance alternative Alicia will receive an annual gross salary increase off10,000. Tusk Ltd will also pay Alicia a mileage allowance of 45 pence per mile when she uses her private car for business journeys.Alicia willdrive 8,000 miles in the performance of her duties for Tusk Ltd during the tax year 2023-24. Alicia's annual car running costs will be f6,200 higher if she uses her own car for both business and private journeys compared to using a company car. Required (a)Advise Alicia of the income tax and national insurance contribution implications for the tax year 2023-24 if she is provided with a company car. Note:Your answer should be supported by appropriate calculations.As Alicia is a higher rate tax payer you can use a working at the margin approach.However,a full computation approach is equally acceptable.You are not expected to consider any implications for Tusk Ltd.(3marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： a.Company car £ Marks Car benefit 22,400*16% 3,584 1 Additional income tax liability 3,584 at 40% 1,434 1 No class 1 employee implications 0 1 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题主要考察car benefit的计算，边际税率的使用，以及员工福利的国民保险。 首先，提供给Alicia 一 辆CO2 排量55g/km 的 petrol car,通过查税表可知rate=16%, 乘 以 list price £22,400,所 以benefit=£3,584 然后，额外的这项car benefit 导致应付税款tax liability增加。根据题目第一段明确指示，Alicia 是高税率纳税者 higher rate taxpayer,所以她的边际税率(即最高税率)是40%。所以，额 外增加的应付税款=£3,584×40%= f1,434。 员工福利的增加，不会导致员工本人支付的国民保险增加。因为员工福利的国民保险NIC class 1A 是由雇主承担的，而本题要求不考虑对公司的影响。 Required (b)Advise Alicia of the income tax and national insurance contribution implications for the tax year 2023-24 if she receives a gross salary increase of f10,000 and is also paid a mileage allowance. Note:Your answer should be supported by appropriate calculations.As Alicia is a higher rate tax payer you can use a working at the margin approach.However,a full computation approach is equally acceptable.You are not expected to consider any implications for Tusk Ltd.(3 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： b.Salary f£ Marks Additional income tax liability 10,000 at 40% 4,000 1 Additional class 1 employee 10,000 at 2% 200 1 Employer paid 8,000 at 45p 3,600 Approved mileage allowance 8,000 at 45p -3,600 0 1 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 难易程度：中 解析： 本题考察边际税率的使用，国民保险的计算，以及mileage allowance的使用。 首先，Alicia 是高税率纳税者 higher rate taxpayer, 所以她的边际税率(即最高税率)是40%。 额外工资£10,000导致应付税款 tax liability 增加，乘以边际税率40%,所以个人所得税增 加£4,000。 其次，额外工资f10,000 导致员工本人支付的国民保险增加，缴纳的是class 1, 她的工资已 经有£60,000,所以超过了£50,270,增加的部分税率是2%。 最 后 ，Alicia 需要使用自己的私家车做商务，并且有8,000英里商务，根据标准的mileage allowance, 每英里可以获得45p 的抵减额度，但由于雇主按每英里45p 实际支付给了她，所 以两者相抵消， payment by employer-mileage allowance=0。 Required (c)Advise Alicia as to which of the two alternative remuneration packages is the most beneficial to her,clearly showing the details from the scenario in your workings.(4 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： c.Company car £ Marks Additional income tax liability 1,434 0.5 Salary Additional salary 10,000 0.5 Mileage allowance 8,000 at 45p 3,600 1 Additional income tax -4,000 0.5 Additional class 1 employee -200 0.5 Additional running costs -6,200 0.5 3,200 The additional salary alternative is therefore the most beneficial 3,200-(-1,434) 4,634 0.5 难易程度：难 解析： 本题要综合考量收益和支出 。 RY-PLATINUM 从 a 问 题 已 经 求 得 提 供 company car 给 Alicia 额 外 带 来f1,434 的 税 务 支 出 。 从b 问题已经求得增加年薪£10,000给Alicia 额外带来£4,000的税务和£200的国民保险支出， 并且私家车的使用给她带来f6,200 额外支出；另一方面，Alicia 额外获得公司£10,000的薪 酬和£3,600的里程补贴。所以收入减支出=£10,000+£3,600-£4,000-£200-£6,200= f3,200, 即总额f3,200 的额外收入。 综合来看，选择让公司增加年薪这种方案能给Alicia带来额外收入，而提供 car 这种方案给 她带来额外支出，所以方案“增加年薪”具有优势，两种方案的差值=£3,200-(f-1,434)=f4,634。 2022-S/D-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1.个人所得税雇佣收入 2.个人所得税员工福利- car benefit,car fuel benefit,exempt benefits 3.Gift aid donation 的税务影响 4.个人所得税核算框架 5.国民保险-National Insurance contribution class 1 6.PAYE forms This scenario relates to three requirements. On 31 July 2023,Dom left his employment with Abacus Ltd where he had worked since 2021. Dom started a new employment with Brass Ltd on 1 August 2023.The following information is available in respect of Dom's employments in the tax year 2023-24. Employment with Abacus Ltd (1)Dom was paid a gross annual salary of £64,800 when employed by Abacus Ltd. (2)On 15 May 2023 Abacus Ltd gave Dom a briefcase costing f100 as a reward for passing a professional exam. (3)During the tax year 2023-24,Dom drove 900 miles on Abacus Ltd company business using his private car.Abacus Ltd reimbursed him for this mileage at a rate of 35 pence per mile. Employment with Brass Ltd (1)Dom was paid a gross annual salary of £76,800 once employed by Brass Ltd. (2)On 1 September 2023 he was provided with a new diesel-powered company car.The car has a list price of £25,200 and an official CO2 emission rate of 122 grams per kilometre.The car does not meet the real driving emissions 2(RDE2)standard. (3)Dom was provided with fuel for private use in respect of this car from 1 September 2023 to 5 April 2024. (4)Brass Ltd has a workplace nursery on its premises which is available to all employees,and Dom's child took up a place there on 1 January 2024.Dom does not pay anything in respect of this nursery place although the nursery fees payable by members of the public for any available places are f700 per month. (5)During the tax year 2023-24,Dom paid £300 to renew his membership of a professional body. This professional membership is a requirement ofhis employment by Brass Ltd. Other income (1)During the tax year 2023-24,Dom received savings income of 700 and dividend income of £3,000. (2)During the tax year 2023-24,Dom made a charitable gift aid donation of £240(net). Required (a)Calculate Dom's income tax liability for the tax year 2023-24. Note:Your computation should include all of the items referred to in the notes,indicating by the use of zero(0)any items which are not taxable or not deductible. (12 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Abacus Ltd 23.4.6-23.7.31 王 Salary 64,800x4/12 21,600 Exam reward-Briefcase 100 Approved mileage allowance claim 900 miles at 10p(45p-35p) -90 Brass Ltd 23.8.1-24.4.5 Salary 76,800x8/12 51,200 Car benefit 23.9.1-24.4.5 25,200x33%(29%+4%)×7/12 4,851 Car fuel benefit 27,800x33%×7/12 5,352 Workplace nursery-all employee 0 Professional subscription -300 Employment income 82,713 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM NSI £ SI f DI f Employment income 82,231 Savings income 700 Dividend income 3,000 Net income 82,231 700 3,000 Personal allowance -12,570 Taxable income 69,661 700 3,000 gross gift aid donation=240x100/80=300 basic rate limit=37,700+300=38,000 Income tax 38,000 at 20% 7,600 (69,661-38,000)at 40% 12,664 500 at 0% 0 (700-500)at 40% 80 1,000 at 0% 0 (3,000-1,000)at 33.75% 675 Tax liability 21,019 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 本题考察个人所得税的计算框架和雇佣收入的计算。 雇佣收入：Dom 在税务年当中换工作，以2023年8月1日加入新公司为界，前面雇主Abacus Ltd 工作4个月，后面Brass Ltd工作8个月分别计算收入。由于两家公司给的都是年 薪，所以分别乘以4/12和8/12。 Abacus Ltd 给的Briefcase 金 额 >E50不属于微小福利，所以不免税；Dom 本人使用自己的 car开了900英里做商务，可以使用mileage allowance 每英里可抵减45p, 由于雇主 补贴35p 每英里，雇主payment 减标准mileage allowance=(£0.35-f0.45)×900=-90, 等于负数，所以是抵减项。 Brass Ltd 提供给Dom 使用的car benefit=rate×list price×time apportion, 根据 CO₂emission 计算百分比(122-55)/5=13.4向下取整，rate=13+16=29%, 不符合标准的diesel car 再加4%,所以是33%,因为是从9月1日开始提供，该税务年实际使用7个月，所 以乘以7/12,最终car benefit=33%×f25,200(list price)×7/12=4,851;car fuel benefit =33%×£27,800(固定值，查税表可得)×7/12=5,352;工作地点的托儿服务是免 税benefit;Do m 本人支付的£300和职业相关的会员费可减。 个人所得税计算：Dom 的雇佣收入属于non-savings income,他的利息收入f700 属于 savings income,同时他还有 f3,000分红收入。 由于Dom 捐赠了gift aid,所 以gross gift aid 影响到他的tax rate band,basic limit=37,700+ 240×100/80=38,000;他的Net income不足£100,000所以他享受不到gross gift aid 对PA的影响，PA=f12,570 NSI 在38,000以下的部分税率20%,超过的部分税率40%,£38,000×20% =£7,600; (E69,661-f38,000)×40%=£12,664; 根 据 Dom 本 人 的 total taxable income (£69,661+f700+£3,000)落在高税率区间，所以判定他是higher rate taxpayer,所以SI 中有£500免税，剩余部分税率40%,(f700-f500)×40%=£200×40%=£80;DI 中 前f£1,000免税，剩余部分税率33.75%,(E3,000-f£1,000)×33.75%=£675。 Required (b)Calculate the total amount of employee class 1 national insurance contributions that Dom will suffer in respect of the tax year 2023-24. (2 marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： Employee class 1 NIC f (50,270-12,570)at 12% 4,524 (21,600+51,200-50,270)at 2% 451 4,975 难易程度：易 解析： NLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 本题考察国民保险Class 1员工缴纳金额的计算。Class 1的计算基础是雇佣收入中现金的部 分。对于Dom 来说，该年度只有salary 是现金收入。超过f12,570 但小于E50,270 的 部分缴纳12%,(E50,270-£12,570)×12%=f4,524; 超过f50,270 的部分缴纳2%,所以 (£21,600雇主 A+f51,200 雇主B-f50,270)×2%=f451;f4,524+£451=£4,975 Required (c)State which PAYE form Abacus Ltd will have provided to Dom when his employment with the company ceased,and what Dom will have been required to do with this form. (1 mark) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： Form P45 would have been provided by Abacus Ltd to Dom.Dom should have then forwarded it to his new employer (retaining a copy in order to complete his self-assessment tax return). 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考察PAYE中表格的内容及使用场景。 表格P45 应该在离职时被原雇主Abacus Ltd 提供给Dom 。Dom 在入职新公司时，需要将该 P45 表格提交给新雇主，同时自己保留其中属于员工的那一份，留作自主报税 self-assessment时使用。 2022-S/D-Q33 本题核心知识点：

stem_zh: 4. 企业经营亏损的抵减 This scenario relates to three requirements. Crumble Ltd has brought forward its accounting reference date to 31 March.Its summarised statement of profit or loss for the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024 is as follows: Note f Gross profit 261,100 Operating expenses Professional fees 1 (23,900) Repairs and renewals 2 (13,100) Qualifying charitable donation 3 (3,400) Other expenses 4 (408,500) Operating loss (187,800) Other income Property business income 5 7,960 Profit on disposal of shares 6 12,800 Finance costs Interest payable 7 (8,750) Loss before taxation (175,790) Note 1-Professional fees Professional fees of E23,900 comprise: f Accountancy fees 6,200 Legal fees in connection with varying the terms of Crumble Ltd's loan notes (see note 7) 4,600 Legal fees in connection with the issue of share capital 9,300 Legal fees in connection with the registration of trade marks 3,800 23,900 NLINE DELIVERY-PLATII NUM ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM The accountancy fees of f6,200 include £2,800 in respect of the additional work arising as a result of a compliance check by HM Revenue and Customs(HMRC)into Crumble Ltd's self-assessment tax return for the year ended 30 June 2022.No additional tax was payable as a result of the compliance check. Note 2-Repairs and renewals Repairs and renewals of f13,100 comprise: f Constructing a new car park next to the company's business premises (there was previously no car park) 7,300 Repairing the wallof an office building after it was damaged by a lorry 5,800 13,100 Note 3-Qualifying charitable donation Crumble Ltd paid the qualifying charitable donation of f3,400 on 15 March 2024. Note 4-Other expenses ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Other expenses of f408,500 comprise: f Removal expenses to the company's new business premises (this was not an expansionary move) 14,400 Fine for infringing health and safety regulations 1,200 Remaining expenses-fully allowable 392,900 408,500 Note 5-Property business income Crumble Ltd lets out a warehouse which is surplus to requirements.The building was empty and available for letting from 1 July to 30 November 2023,but was let from 1 December 2023 onwards.The following income and expenditure was received or incurred during the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024: Date received/(paid) f 1 July 2023 Insurance for the year ended 30 June 2024 (840) 1 December 2023 Rent for the six months ended 31 May 2024 6,600 1 December 2023 Security deposit oftwo months'rent 2,200 7,960 Note 6-Profit on disposal of shares On 22 December 2023,Crumble Ltd sold a1%shareholding in an unconnected company for £25,200.The shareholding had been purchased for f12,400,and its indexed cost on 22 December 2023 was f13,600. Note 7-Interest payable The interest payable off8,750 is in respect of the company's loan notes which were issued on 1 January 2016 and were due for repayment on 31 December 2023.However,Crumble Ltd has varied the terms of the loan notes so that they are now repayable on 31 December 2028.At the same time,the annual rate of interest payable was reduced from 7%to 4%with effect from 1 January 2024. Interest of £8,750 was paid on 31 December 2023 in relation to the six-month period ended on that date.Interest for the six-month period ending 30 June 2024 will be £5,000. The loan notes were issued in order to finance the company's trading activities. Capital allowances No capital allowances are available for the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024. Yearended 30 June 2023 For the year ended 30 June 2023 Crumble Ltd had total profits off49,000. Required (a)Calculate Crumble Ltd's tax adjusted trading loss for the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024.(7 marks) Notes: 1.Your computation should commence with the operating loss figure of£187,800,and should also list all of the items referred to in notes 1,2,3,4 and 7,indicating by the use of zero(0)any items that do not require adjustment. 2.For this part ofthe question,the items referred to in notes 5 and 6 are not relevant. 题目类型：excel 答 案 ： (a) Crumble Ltd -Tax-adjusted trading loss for the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024 f Marks Operating loss (187,800) Accountancy fees 0 0.5 Compliance check 0 0.5 Legal fees in connection with varying the terms of loan notes 0 0.5 Legal fees in connection with the issue of share capital 9,300 0.5 Legal fees in connection with the registration of trade marks 0 0.5 Construction ofnew car park 7,300 0.5 Repairing the wall of an office building 0 0.5 Qualifying charitable donations 3,400 0.5 Removal expenses 0 0.5 Fine for infringing health and safety regulations 1,200 0.5 Remaining expenses -allowable 0 0.5 Interest payable(8,750+(5,000×3/6)) (11,250) 1.5 Trading loss (177,850) 难易程度：难 解 析 ： 本题考察经营收入金额的调节。 首先必须明确，经营活动金额的调节需要在计税期间AP(accounting period) 之 内 ，AP 参 照公司的账期period of accounts, 只要不超过12个月，AP 和公司账期保持一致。所以本题 AP=2023 年7月1日至2024年3月31日，共9个月。 本题是经营亏损，所以计算的起点£187,800应为负数。 会计费用可减，无需调整； 配合HMRC 进行合规检查并且没有发现违规，费用可减，无需调整； 法律费用-更改loan notes 的期限 (loan notes 是公司债券的一种形式),而note 7 表明该债券 的目的是支持经营活动，所以可减，无需调整； 法律费用-发行股票，不可减，需加回£9,300; 法律费用-注册商标可减，无需调整； 建造停车场属于capital性质，在trading profit中不可减，所以加回£7,300; 修理费用可减，无需调整； QCD 不可放在trading profit中，需加回£3,400; IVERY-PLATINUM 迁移办公场所并且没有扩建项目，所以费用可减，无需调整； 由于违背健康与安全法规产生的罚款不可减，所以加回f£1,200; 应付利息，由于该债券的目的是支持经营活动，所以在trading 中可减，而核算的起点 (£187,800)中没有包括该利息所以需要减去。金额包括2023.7.1至2023.12.31的部分£8,750, 以及2024.1.1至2024.3.31的部分f5,000×3/6, 总额£8,750+(E5,000×3/6)=£11,250。 调整过后的经营亏损£177,850。 Required (b)Before taking account of any possible loss relief claim,calculate Crumble Ltd's taxable total profits for the nine-month period ended 31March 2024. Note:For this part of the question,only the items referred to in notes 3,5 and 6 are relevant.(4 marks) 题目类型：e xcel 答 案 ： (b)Crumble Ltd-Taxable total profits for the nine-month period ended 31March 2024 f Marks Property business income Rent receivable(6,600×4/6) 4,400 1 Security deposit 0 0.5 Insurance(840×9/12) Chargeable gain(25,200-13,600) (630) 3,770 11,600 1 1 Total profits less:Qualifying charitable donations Taxable total profits 15,370 (3,400) 11,970 0.5 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 本题考察应税总收入的核算。 由于经营是亏损，所以trading profit 为零。 租赁房产收入，公司需按照accrual basis来核算，从2023.12.1开始出租，到AP 结束2024.3.31 一共4个月，应收租金=£6,600×4/6=£4,400;保险费£840缴纳的是2023.7.1至2024.6.30一 年的，但落在AP 中只有9个月，所以£840×9/12=£630。 Deposit是押金，不可计入收入。 资本利得，卖掉股票，公司的资本利得需要将通货膨胀计入成本 (indexation allowance), 题目没有提供股票购买日期，无法判断购买日期是否在2017.12.31之前，但由于提供了 indexed cost,所以认为这个成本是已经考虑过indexation allowance的成本，因此资本利得三 f25,200-£13,600=f11,600。 最后减去QCD, 可得应税总收入=£11,970 Required (c)(i)State by what date Crumble Ltd must make a claim ifit wishes to set its trading loss for the nine-month period ended 31 March 2024(as calculated in part(a))against the company's total profits for the year ended 30 June 2023.(1 mark) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： (i)Claim A claim must be made by31 March 2026(within two years of the end of the period ended 31 March 2024,the loss making period). 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考核公司loss relief的时间期限。因为亏损产生的账期结束日是2024.3.31,向税务局 申报loss relief要在该日期两年之内完成，所以是2026.3.31。 Required (c)(ii)Calculate the amount of corporation tax which will be repaid by HM Revenue and Customs(HMRC)if Crumble Ltd makes this loss relief claim against the company's total profits for the year ended 30 June 2023. Note:You should take into account any necessary loss relief claim against the total profits for the nine-month period ended 31March 2024(as calculated in part (b)). (3 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： (ii)Repayment of corporation tax The loss carried back is 177,850-15,370=£162,480.(1.5marks) This is more than Crumble Ltd's total profits off49,000 for the year ended 30 June 2023,so the corporation tax repayable is f49,000×19%=f9,310.(1.5 marks) 难易程度： 中 解 析 ： 本题考察经营亏损的抵减方式。 从问题上看，公司要向HMRC 申报抵减2023.6.30这个账期的利润，所以是carry back relief。 根据规则，在计税期间AP 产生的亏损，必须在抵减当年的total profit before QCD之后， 才可以向计税期间开始之前的12月带。所以，首先抵减当年的之后亏损还剩177,850-15,370 =f162,480, 而 y/e 2023.6.30的 total profits只 有 f49,000, 因此最多只能抵减 f49,000, 该 金额小于lower limit f50,000, 所以按照19%的税率，同时23年3月31日之前的税率位固 定的19%,因此可退回的税金为f49,000×19%=£9,310。 2023-M/J-Q31 本题核心知识点：

5. 国民保险-National Insurance contribution class 1 You should assume that today's date is 25 March 2024 and the tax rates and allowances for the tax year 2023-24 apply throughout. Kazuo is currently employed at a gross annual salary of f£200,000.Kazuo will continue to earn the same salary until he retires on 5 April 2027,at which point his income willreduce to gross annual pension income of f55,000.This means that Kazuo is currently an additional rate taxpayer,but will only be a higher rate taxpayer from when he retires on 5 April 2027. Kazuo will undertake f40,000 ofwork on a freelance basis during the year ended 5 April 2024.To carry out this work,Kazuo will form a new limited company,Zaoku Ltd,of which he will be an employee.This freelance work will not involve any expenditure and will last for just one year, from 6 April 2023 to 5 April 2024.Zaoku Ltd will prepare accounts for the year ended 5 April 2024. Kazuo is looking at three alternative ways of extracting the profits of Zaoku Ltd: Alternative 1 After allowing for corporation tax,Kazuo will withdraw the entire net of tax profits as dividends during the tax year 2023-24. Alternative 2 Zaoku Ltd will pay Kazuo gross directors'remuneration of £8,000 and Zaoku Ltd will make a pension contribution of f32,000 into a company occupational pension scheme on Kazuo's behalf during the tax year 2023-24.Kazuo has sufficient unused pension annual allowances so that a pension contribution of this amount will not result in an annual allowance charge. Alternative 3 Kazuo will not withdraw any amounts during the tax year 2023-24.Instead,the net of tax profits will be left undrawn in Zaoku Ltd until the tax year 2027-28 when Kazuo has retired.He will then withdraw the entire net of tax amount as dividends in the tax year 2027-28. Kazuo does not have any other income. Assuming that Kazuo withdraws the entire net of tax profits of Zaoku Ltd as dividends (alternative 1)during the tax year 2023-24: (a)(i)Calculate the corporation tax liability of Zaoku Ltd for the year ended 5 April 2024; and (1mark) (ii)Calculate the income tax payable by Kazuo in respect of his dividend income. (2marks) 题目类型：word 答案 ： Marks (i)Zaoku Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 5 April 2024 will be f7,600 (40,000 at 19%) 1 (ii)Kazuo will receive dividend income of f32,400(40,000-7,600)and the income tax payable on this amount will be £12,356((32,400-1,000)at 39.35%). 2 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题考察企税的计算以及分红收入纳税的计算。 该问按照要求根据alternative 1也就是Kazuo 将全部利润扣完企业所得税后作为股息发放至 个人账户去计算。 第一小问，企业所得税按所得利润乘以税率计算。公司的税率根据 Augment profit(Taxable Total Profit+Dividends from non-51%group companies) 来判定，由于公司没有非关联公司， 所以根据taxable total profit 即40,000进行判定，40,000小于lower limit 50,000, 因此今年的 税率为19%, corporation tax liability =f40,000*19%=f7,600。 第二小问，根据第一小问算出来企税为完税后利润为f7,600, 因此税后利润为f40,000- f7,600=£32,400 。 题干又写道Kazuo 在2023-24年度是additional rate taxpayer,因此dividend income 查表需使用最高税率39.35%。此处注意税务局针对dividend income对所有纳税人都 有£1,000的免税额，因此该笔股利的 tax payable=(f32,400-£1,000)*39.35%=£12,356。 Assuming that Zaoku Ltd will pay Kazuo gross directors'remuneration of £8,000 and Zaoku Ltd will make a pension contribution of £32,000 into a company occupational pension scheme on Kazuo's behalf(alternative 2)during the tax year 2023-24: (b)(i)Explain the corporation tax,income tax and national insurance contributions (NICs) implications of alternative 2;and (3marks) (ii)Calculate the tax saving of alternative 2 compared with alternative 1(entirely as dividends). (1mark) Notes: 1.You are not expected to explain the tax implications of ultimately receiving a pension from the pension scheme. 2.Zaoku Ltd is not entitled to the NICs annual employment allowance. 题目类型：word 答案： Marks i) Paying the director's remuneration and making the pension contribution will reduce Zaoku Ltd's taxable total profits(and corporation tax liability)to f0(40,000-8,000- 32,000). 1 Kazuo will pay income tax of just f3,600(8,000 at 45%)because the pension contribution will be an exempt benefit. 1 There will be no class 1 NICs because the earnings of £8,000 are below the NIC lower threshold. 1 ii) The overall tax saving compared to alternative 1 will be f16,356(7,600+12,356- 3,600). 1 难易程度：中 DELIVE
explanation_zh: 本题考察税务统筹方面的应用。 该小问按照要求根据alternative 2 也就是Kazuo 将从 Zaoku 公司领取一部分工资，剩余的利 润将作为职业养老金打入 Kazuo 的账户中去计算。 第一小问，公司给员工发工资以及给员工交OPS 都可以从公司的经营利润中扣减，这种选 择会使公司的 taxable total profit 应纳税利润降为0,因此无需缴纳企业所得税。其次由于公 司给员工交的职业养老金对于员工来说是免税福利(不会导致雇佣收入增加),Kazuo 只需 针对收到的工资E8,000 雇工收入缴纳个人所得税。由于Kazuo 在2023-24年度是 additional rate taxpayer,employment income查表需使用最高税率45%,该笔收入的 tax payable=£8,000 *45%=f3,600。 最后对于国民保险，由于个人cash earnings均低于NIC 上缴下限(£12,570), 因此无需缴纳class 1 NICs。 第二小问，其实就是问两种方法之差，也就是a)问减去 b)的答案即可。首先a)问 的alternative 1=corporation tax liability f7,600+income tax liability £12,356=f19,956;b)问 alternative 2= income tax liability £3,600 。 所以tax saving=alternative 1-alternative2=£19,956-f3,600= £16,356。 (c)Calculate the tax saving in respect of Kazuo's dividend income and Zaoku Ltd's corporation tax liability if Kazuo withdraws the entire net of tax profits of Zaoku Ltd as dividends during the tax year 2027-28(alternative 3)when Kazuo has retired,rather than during the tax year 2023-24(alternative 1). (3marks) 题目类型：word 答案： Marks Zaoku Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 5 April 2024 will remain 0.5 unchanged at £7,600. For 2027-28,Kazuo will be a higher rate taxpayer,so the income tax payable in respect of his dividend income will be reduced to £10,598((32,400-1,000)at 33.75%). 1.5 The overall tax saving compared to alternative 1 will be £1,758 (12,356-10,598). 1 难易程度： 中 解析： 本题考察税务统筹方面的应用。 该小问按照要求根据alternative3 也 就 是 Kazuo 将全部利润扣完企业所得税后作为股息发放 至个人账户，但是为了降低税率，将发放时间延至退休后。 此时企业所得税无任何变化，税率都是19%。因此 corporation tax liability=f40,000*19%= £7,600。公司税没有省。对于个人所得税，考虑的是退休之后2027/28年。由于退休后Kazuo 的身份由additional rate taxpayer变 为higher rate taxpayer,dividend income的税率将由39 .35% 下降至33.75%,在2027/28税务年度针对 dividend income的 tax payable=(E32,400-£1,000) *33.75%=£10,598。 以下算法二选一： 最后总节省算法： corporation tax liability 不变，个税节约了， tax saving=income tax liability saving=£12,356-£10,598=£1,758。 2023-M/J-Q32 本题核心知识点：

stem_zh: 4. 个人所得税-结业年度税务折旧的计算 This scenario relates to three requirements. On 31 March 2024,Hannah ceased self-employment.On 1 January 2024,she commenced employment with Lomly Ltd. The following information is available in respect of the tax year 2023-24: Self-employment Hannah's tax adjusted trading loss for the period ended 31 March 2024 was f66,000.This figure is before taking account of capital allowances.Prior to this final trading period,Hannah had always prepared accounts to 31 March each year. On 1 April 2023,the tax written down values of Hannah's plant and machinery were as follows: f£ Main pool 25,000 Car 7,700 The car has a CO2 emissions rate of 105 grams per kilometre and is used by Hannah 40%for business mileage. On 15May 2023,Hannah bought office equipment for f4,500. On 31 March 2024,all of the items of plant and machinery were disposed of for the following proceeds: Proceeds f£ Main pool 29,000 Car 10,000 None of the items were sold for more than their original cost. Hannah's recent tax adjusted trading profits have been: f Year ended 31 March 2021 45,000 Year ended 31 March 2022 82,000 Year ended 31 March 2023 40,000 These figures are after taking account of capital allowances. Employment On 1 January 2024,Hannah commenced employment with Lomly Ltd earning a gross annual salary off125,000.Lomly Ltd also provides Hannah with the following benefits: Living accommodation On 1 January 2024,Hannah moved into a property owned by Lomly Ltd which does not qualify as job-related accommodation.The property has an annual value of £16,000.The property was purchased by Lomly Ltd on 1 September 2020 for f250,000 and its market value on 1 January 2024 was £280,000. Beneficialloan Lomly Ltd provided Hannah with an interest-free loan of f60,000 on 1 January 2024.She has repaid f2,500 at the end of each month starting on 31 January 2024.The taxable benefit in respect of this loan is calculated using the average method. Travel and expenses During the period 1 January to 5 April 2024,Hannah used her private car to travel 6,000 business miles.She was reimbursed by Lomly Ltd at a rate of 50 pence per mile. Hannah also paid f450 out of her own bank account for hotel rooms which she stayed in during business trips in these three months.Lomly Ltd reimbursed her for these expenses on 20 March 2024. Requirements (a)Calculate the trading income assessment of Hannah for the tax year 2023-24 if she had claimed terminalloss relief. (6 marks) 题目类型：excel ONLINE DELIVERY-PL 答 案 ： Trading income for the tax year 2023-24: f Marks Trading loss for the year ended 31 March 2024 -66,000 0.5 Balancing charge(working) 420 0.5 Revised Trading loss for the year ended 31 March 2024 -65,580 Terminal loss of last 12 months 65,580 Less trading profit of 22/23 -40,000 0.5 Less trading profit of 21/22 -25,580 0.5 Trading income assessment for 23/34 0 0.5 Working-Capital allowances Main pool Car with Private use Allowances Marks f f f TWDV b/fat 1April 2023 25,000 7,700 0.5 Addition 4,500 0.5 Disposals (29,000) (10,000) 1 500 (2,300) Balancing allowance (500) 500 0.5 Balancing charge 2,300 (920) 1 TWDV c/f 0 0 Overall balancing charge (420) 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: (1) 本题考察结业年度个人所得税下的贸易利润的计算。 (2) 调整金额：最后12个月这段期间的 trading profit/loss.Self-employment 下的第一句 话有提到这tax adjusted trading loss是£66,000,并且是 before taking account of capital allowances, 因此需要要计算 Capital allowance。 (3) 在计算结业会计期间的capital allowance时，是没有WDA 和AIA 的，只有BA/BC。 因 此main pool在处置后出现f500 余额时会产生 balancing allowance f500。同样的， 在计算 car 时，也只有 balancing charge f2,300。这里需要注意的是，由于小汽车存 在私用部分，在计算其capital allowance时需乘以商用比例40%,因此balancing charge =£2,300*40%=f920 。BA/BC 不需要做time apportion。 (4) 最终这三个月的overall balancing charge=f500-f920=f420,会 导 致 trading profit 增加，trading loss 减少。所以revised trading profit=-f66,000+£420=-f65,580,即 最后12个月的trading loss是£65,580。 (5) 题目给出终止经营之前三年的trading profit并且申请了terminal loss relief。终止经营 最后12个月的亏损可以抵减前三个税年的经营利润，以最大值扣减，并且要先抵减 最晚的税务年度。所以应该按照先抵减22/23税年，再21/22税年这样的顺序，直到 把亏损抵减至0。。 (b)Calculate the employment income of Hannah for the tax year 2023-24. Note:You should indicate by the use of zero(0)any items which are not taxable or deductible. (8marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： f Marks Salary(£125,000x3/12) 31,250 0.5 Living accommodation(working 1) 4,985 Beneficial loan(working 2) 316 Mileage allowance(working 3) 300 Reimbursed expenses(exempt) 0 0.5 Employment income 36,851 Working 1-Living accommodation Annual value 16,000 0.5 Additional charge((250,000-75,000)x2.25%) 3,938 1.5 19,938 Taxable benefit(19,938x3/12) 4,985 0.5 Working 2-Beneficial loan Average method Balance at 1 January 2024 60,000 0.5 Balance at 5 April 2024(60,000-(3x2,500)) 52,500 1 112,500 Average loan(112,500/2) 56,250 0.5 Taxable benefit(56,250x2.25%x3/12) 316 1 Working 3-Mileage allowance Mileage allowance received(6,000 miles at 50p) 3,000 Approved mileage allowance(6,000 miles at 45p) (2,700) Taxable benefit 300 1.5 难易程度：难 解析： 本题考察个人所个税下雇工收入的计算。 (1)首先我们需要注意的是这份工作开始于2024. 1. 1,因此在fiscal year 23-24, 也 就 是 2024.1.1-2024.4.5只有3个月，在后续的计算中需要time-apportion。 (2)先计算 salary 。Employment 的第一句有写其gross annual salary税前年薪是f125,000, 因 此3个月的收入为£125,000*3/12=£31,250。 (3)接着算 living accommodation benefit 。 General charge 根据题目中给出的annual value 计 算为£16,000。这个房子Lomly Ltd 的采购成本为f250,000, 大 于f75,000, 因此将产生 additional charge。在计算 additional charge时，还需要判断雇主购房的时间和第一次提供 给员工居住时间之间是否大于六年，若大于六年，成本需要用第一次提供给员工的市场 价值，加上在本税务年度之前和第一次提供居住之后的改进成本来计算。题目中未超过 六年，所以直接用买价£250,000计算。代入公式 additional charge=(cost-f75,000)* official rate of interest, 今年的 official rate of interest 为2 . 25%,所以additional charge = (£250,000-£75,000)*2.25%=f3,938 。 记得最后还要time-apportion 乘以3/12。 (4)接下来算 beneficial loan benefit。题干要求使用average method 平均法计算法，计算公式 为(opening balance+closing balance)*1/2*official rate of interest*m/12,opening balance =£60,000,closing balance=£60,000-(3x £2,500)=£52,500。因此正常应付利息为56,250 *2.25%*3/12=£316。由于该贷款是interest-free loan 免息贷款，没有实付利息可减， 全部为taxable benefito (5)员工使用私家车办公，法定 mileage allowance 和实际补贴的差额将会产生allowable deduction 或 benefit,该题目中实际的补贴大于法定抵减额的，因此差额部分作为taxable benefit 加入 employment income。 (6)最后报销的费用是由于工作产生，属于免税福利，用0表示。 (c)Explain how the tax treatment of the property provided to Hannah would differ if it qualified as job-related accommodation. (1 mark) (15 marks) 题目类型：word 答 案 ： If the property provided to Hannah by Lomly Ltd qualified as job-related accommodation,there would be no taxable benefit。 难易程度：易 解析：和工作相关的住所不产生应税福利，英文答题需要写完整的句子，可以使用简单句表 达免税 (exempt) 及其原因 (job-related) 即可。 2023-M/J-Q33 本题核心知识点：

stem_zh: 5. 企业所得税计算 This scenario relates to one requirement. Venus Ltd's summarised statement of profit or loss for the year ended 31 March 2024 is as follows: Note f Gross profit 521,750 Operating expenses Depreciation (32,046) Amortisation of leasehold property 1 (4,000) Other expenses 2 (285,012) Operating profit 200,692 Income from investments Bank interest received 3 18,050 Dividends received 4 34,000 Profit on disposal of shares 5 70,300 Profit before taxation 323,042 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINI Note1-Leasehold property On 1 October 2023,Venus Ltd acquired a leasehold office building for use by the business,paying a premium of f96,000 for the grant of a 12-year lease. Note 2-Other expenses Other expenses include the following: f Entertaining UK customers 3,600 Gifts to customers(food costing f30 each) 2,730 Qualifying charitable donations 1,410 Note 3-Bank interest received The bank interest received during the year ended 31 March 2024 of £18,050 relates to deposits held for non-trading purposes.In addition,on 10 April 2024,£350 ofnon-trading loan interest was received in relation to the year ended 31 March 2024. Note 4-Dividends received During the year ended 31 March 2024,Venus Ltd received dividends of 34,000 from Mars Ltd, an 80%UK subsidiary company. Note 5-Profit on disposal of shares The profit on disposal of shares is in respect of a 2%shareholding that was sold on 18 January 2024.The disposal resulted in a chargeable gain of £62,880 after taking account of the indexation allowance. Note 6-Plant and machinery On1 April 2023,the tax written down values of plant and machinery were as follows: f Main pool 8,400 Special rate pool 12,740 The following purchases took place during the year ended 31 March 2024: Date Description CO2 emissions f 10 August 2023 Car(1) 115 22,930 16November 2023 New delivery van 120 20,800 18 November 2023 Equipment(second hand) n/a 52,112 12 February 2024 Car(2) 40 26,470 On 15 March 2024,Venus Ltd sold an equipment in main pool for proceeds of £1,005 on which the 130%super deduction had been claimed(the sale proceeds are less than the original cost). explanation_zh: 本题考察企业所得税的计算。 (1)首先需要先阅读题干大致判断一下其归类。主表格给的是会计利润，应处于 trading profit 里，需要进行金额调整。Note 1提到了作为tenant 所付出的premium, 属 于trading profit 里的项目。Note 2 为具体会计利润到税务利润的调整，属于trading profit 里的项 目 。Note 3 bank interest received,属于investment income的项目。Note 4 dividends received 属于TTP 大框架的判断。Note 5 Profit on disposal of shares 属于chargeable gains的项目。 Note 6 属于trading profit项目中capital allowances 的计算。Note 7 属于集团亏损相互递 减的项目。在做题的时候先标记一下其归属的项目可以避免在计算大框架时遗漏项目 的计算导致不必要的扣分。 (2)接着看题目的要求，要求考生从 operating profit figure f200,692开始调整。因此我们从 这个数字开始计算，将会计利润调整成税务认可的税务利润。 (3)看到主表格的Operating expenses 中扣除了depreciation 以及amortisation的费用，会计 折旧和摊销税法上不允许抵扣，因此加回。此知识点在教材第7章。 (4)主表格提到了Note 1,Venus Ltd 作为 tenant 房客，其premium 的处理方式为首先根据公 式算出房东的taxable premium=P-P*(n-1)*2%=96,000-96,000*(12-1)*2%= f74,880, (或使用公式P*(51-n)/50 得到相同答案f74,880)。然后作为房客平均分摊到 租期的每一年从 trading profit 中扣除。注意这个leasehold office building是从2022.10.1 开始租的，在这个会计期间2023.10.1-2024.3.31只有6个月，需要 time-apportion 。 最 终从 trading profit 扣除的premium=£74,880/12*6/12=£3,120 。 此知识点在教材第5 章。 (5)接下来看Note 2。Entertaining UK customers 不允许扣除，需要加回。 Gifts to customers 因为是食物，因此不能扣除需要加回。此知识点在教材第7章。 (6)Qualifying charitable donations并不归属于 trading profit 这个项目，因此在计算 trading profit 时需要先加回，记得后续在计算TTP 时再扣除。此知识点在教材第17章。 (7)接下来看Note 3。两个利息收入均与贸易无关，根据loan relationship rule,属于investment income 。此知识点在教材第17章。 (8)Note 4 分红收入，不计入企税 TTP 计算，属于迷惑项。根据题目要求，用0表示。此 知识点在教材第17章。 (9)Note 5 profit on disposal of shares 属 于chargeable gains,直接写上便可。 (10)接下来看 Note 6,其具体计算过程在working 2中。这里需要关注的点是Car 1和Car 2 因为是小轿车，因此只能享受 WDA 。其中Car 1是高排车，属于SRP 。Van 和二手 equipment 享受AIA, 处置的 equipment 原来已享受130%FYA, 处置收入不高于成本的 部分直接接入BC。 (11)Note 7集团内部亏损的相互抵减，此知识点在教材第21章。 (12)最后题目要求算出今年的企业所得税，因为TTP 超过 upper limit 125,000,所以计算使用 的税率是25%。 2023-S/D-Q31 本题核心知识点： 1.个人所得税和NIC 的计算。 2.企业所得税的计算。 3.税务筹划方案对比。 This scenario relates to two requirements. You should assume that today's date is 25March 2023. Bertie is the managing director of,and 100%shareholder in,Rebite Ltd. For the past few years,Bertie has taken a high level of director's remuneration from Rebite Ltd to fund his personal pension contributions and the lease payments on his private car.However,Bertie has now realised that these are not the most tax beneficial arrangements,and is therefore considering more beneficial alternative arrangements. Existing arrangements If Bertie continues with the existing arrangements for the tax year 2023-24: (1)Rebite Ltd will pay Bertie gross director's remuneration of f75,000. (2)Bertie will use his private car for business mileage,with Rebite Ltd paying a mileage allowance of 45 pence per mile for business journeys.Bertie will drive 10,000 miles in the performance of his duties for Rebite Ltd during the tax year 2023-24. (3)Bertie will make personal pension contributions of f25,000(gross). Bertie does not have any other income. After taking account of the above,Rebite Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 5 April 2024 will be f9,873. Beneficial arrangements If Bertie adopts the beneficial arrangements throughout the tax year 2023-24: (1)Instead of paying any director's remuneration,Rebite Ltd will pay Bertie dividends of £35,000. (2)Instead of Bertie running a private car,Rebite Ltd will provide Bertie with a company car. This will be an electric car with a list price of f37,000 and zero CO₂emissions per kilometre. The car willbe leased by Rebite Ltd at an annual cost of f12,000. Because the car will be electric,there will be no car fuel benefit. (3)Instead of Bertie personally making personal pension contributions,Rebite Ltd will make pension contributions of £25,000 into a company pension scheme on his behalf. Before taking account of any deductions under the beneficial arrangements(dividends,leasing costs and pension contributions)Rebite Ltd will have a trading profit of f140,000 for the year ended 5 April 2024. (a)Calculate the reduction in Bertie's income tax and employee class 1 national insurance contributions(NIC)for the tax year 2023-24 if the beneficial arrangements are implemented throughout the year,rather than the existing arrangements. Note:Where relevant,you are expected to produce full income tax and employee class 1 NIC computations.(7marks) 题目类型：excel 答案： (a) Existing arrangements f Director's remuneration 75,000 Mileage allowance 0 Less:PA (12,570) Taxable income 62,430 Working 1: Basic rate limit 37,700+25,000 62,700 Income tax f 62,430×20% 12,486 f 37,700(50,270-12,570)×12% 4,524 24,730(75,000-50,270)×2% 495 Class 1 employee NIC 5,019 Beneficial arrangements NSI f DI £ Dividends 35,000 Car benefit 37,000×2% 740 Company pension contribution 0 Less:PA (740) (11,830) Taxable income 0 23,170 Income tax f 1,000×0% 0 22,170(23,170-1,000)×8.75% 1,940 The reduction in Bertie's income tax and employee class 1 NIC is f15,565(12,486+5,019-1,940). 1,940 The reduction in Bertie's income tax and employee class 1 NIC is f15,565(12,486+5,019-1,940). 难易程度：易 解 析 ： 本题要求计算如果采取更划算的方案能节约多少income tax和class 1 employee NIC,因此需 要根据题目信息分别计算两个方案各自的income tax和class 1 employee NIC,对比差值就是 最后答案。 Existing arrangements: (1)薪酬E75,000作为雇佣收入计入NSI 交税 (2)私车公用计算mileage allowance, 因雇主补贴的金额和法定津贴额一样，都是10,000 miles×45 pence,所以结果为0 (3)Gross PPS f£25,000会抬高刻度线，影响ANI 计算 因为ANI 没有超过£100,000,PA 还是£12,570,减去PA 得到 taxable income,在 basic rate limit 以下，因此税率为20%, 得 到income tax。 Class 1 employee NIC 根据cash earning计算，本题也就是根据薪酬E75,000。 Beneficial arrangements: (1)dividend income f35,000作为 DI 交税 (2)公司提供车使用计算car benefit,0排车 Rate为2%,乘以list price,作为雇佣收入计 入NSI 交税 (3)公司为他投入OPS , 对员工来说是 exempt benefit PA为£12,570,先减NSI 再减DI 得到 taxable income,DI有f1,000 nil rate band, 剩余部分税 率8.75%,得到income tax。该方案下没有 cash earning,无需计算Class 1 employee NIC。 对比差值得到答案。 (b)Calculate the increase in Rebite Ltd's corporation tax liability for the year ended 5 April 2024 if the beneficial arrangements are implemented throughout the year,rather than the existing arrangements. Notes: 1.You are not expected to recalculate the corporation tax liability under the existing arrangements. 2.You should assume that the rate of corporation tax remains unchanged.(3 marks) (10 marks) 题目类型：excel .答案： . f Trading profit 140,000 Less:leasing costs (12,000) Less:pension contribution (25,000) Taxable total profits 103,000 Corporation tax 50,000*19% 9,500 (103,000-50,000)*26.5% 14,045 23,545 The increase in Rebite Ltd's corporation tax liability is f13,672(23,545-9,873) DELIVERY-PLAT 难易程度：中 解析：本题要求计算采用beneficial arrangements后 Rebite Ltd 的企业所得税增加多少。题目 已告知 Existing arrangements 下 corporation tax liability 为f9,873, 所以只需计算 beneficial arrangements 下企业所得税为多少，对比差值即为答案。 Beneficial arrangements: Trading profit 为f140,000, 为员工租车的leasing costs 和为员工投入的OPS 可以从Trading profit 中减去，得到TTP103,000(50,000 以上，250,000以下),计算时50,000以内部分乘以 税率19%,超过50,000部分乘以速算率26.5%,得到企业所得税，与£9,873的差值就是最 后答案。 2023-S/D-Q32 本题核心知识点： 1.个人所得税的计算，尤其是雇佣收入。 2.夫妻之间转让PA。 3.夫妻之间转让财产对个税的影响。 This scenario relates to three requirements. Esme's income tax liability would reduce by f5,000(6,000-1,000)×33.75%=£1,688. 难易程度：中 解 析 ： 本题要求解释如果Esme 将所有的quoted shares 转给Andy,对两个人的个人所得税有什么影 响 。Esme 将所有的quoted shares 转给 Andy, 那么Andy 会多一笔dividend income £6,000, 加上自己原先有的dividend income f7,000 也就是f13,000, 该金额减去PAf12,570 得到DI 的 taxable income f430,DI有f1,000 的 nil rate band, 因此Andy 不需要交税。对于Esme, 少了dividend income f6,000,可以节约个税(6,000-1,000)×33.75%。 2023-S/D-Q33 本题核心知识点： 1.企业贸易利润、租赁收入和资本利得的计算。 2.企业TTP 的计算。 3.企业loss relief 和 group relief 的处理。 This scenario relates to two requirements. The following information is available in respect of Maximum Ltd for the year ended 31 March 2024: Trading profit The trading profit based on the draft accounts for the year ended 31 March 2024 is £127,200.This figure is before making any adjustments required for: (1)A premium which was paid on 1 August 2023 to acquire a leasehold office building on an eight-year lease.The amount of premium assessed on the landlord as income was f22,320.The office building was used for business purposes by Maximum Ltd throughout the period 1 August 2023 to 31March 2024. stem_zh: Section B:3个客观案例题，每个案例包含5道客观题，每题2分，共30分。 Section C:3道主观题，分别为10分，15分，15分，共40分。 客观题题型有单选，多选，填空，拖拽，配对等形式。 Section C中有两道15分的题目， 一道考查个人所得税， 一道考查企业所得税。 Section C的主观题需要在简易的Excel 区域进行作答。 TX 考试中的各类题型难度： 1.客观题考查知识点涉及考纲各个部分，范围全面。 2.主观计算类题目，个人所得税和企业所得税综合题仍是考查重点，并且近年来综合类计算题是考查趋势， 需关注税务筹划相关问题，深刻理解知识点。并且，考生需要练习如何在Excel 上作答，熟练掌握 Excel 的功能 。 3.主观文字类题目占比较少，需要考生记忆背诵，可以使用简单的英文表达即可。 7.学习建议 高顿ACCA, 为学员赢得世界尊重 TX(UK) 这门课程的知识点较多，且比较细碎，因此通过练题熟练知识点非常重要，不仅可以对知识点 进行查漏补缺，还可以提高做题速度，帮助更好地通过考试。注意练题时客观题和主观题一样重要，都要 进行练习。考试的题目会涉及考纲当中的每个部分，尤其是对于税法当中必考的基础和重要知识点，学员 们一定要通过做题熟练地掌握操作方法，争取考试时不丢分，少丢分。 另外建议学员在题目的练习之后，可以根据答案给自己评分，并且能够进行有针对性的总结整理，理清思 路和框架，从而减少错误，熟悉税法规则。 另外本次考纲改革企业所得税知识点变动大，需格外注意。 8.考试思路 建议备考时长：1个月的课程知识学习+1个月的做题自我练习总结。 考试前自查：课程知识是否学习完毕，每个税种的题目(包括客观题和主观题)是否已练习，尤其是个人 所得税和企业所得税的主观计算题，每个税种的税收征管知识是否已牢记，客观题能否在提高速度的同时 保证正确率，主观题得分率能否达到70%-80%。 充分利用好模考：测试和锻炼考生对于考试时间合理分配的能力，提高机考界面操作的熟练度，根据考试 结果对相关知识点进行查漏补缺，复习教材对应的知识点，再去练习几道知识点相关的类似题型。 9.注意事项 在课程结束之后，学员一定要及时整理知识框架，并且通过大量的练习加强知识点的记忆和熟练度! 在课程结束之后，学员一定要及时整理知识框架，并且通过大量的练习加强知识点的记忆和熟练度!
